de_text: Sie sind auf der Suche nach Ansprechpartner*innen und Informationen bei der Planung und Umsetzung einer raum- bzw. gebäudebezogenen Weiterentwicklung der Universität?
en_grtr: Looking for the right people and information for planning and delivering a project to enhance the University’s spaces and/or buildings?
tr_llm: Are you looking for contacts and information for planning and implementing a space- or building-related development of the university?
tr_llm_glsr: Are you searching for contacts and information for the planning and Transfer of a room- or building-related development of the University?

de_text: Hier finden Sie Informationen, wie sich Universitätseinrichtungen, wo, in welchem Umfang entwickeln können, wollen oder sollen.
en_grtr: Here you can find details of how and where the University’s institutes, departments and units are able, keen or expected to develop.
tr_llm: Here you will find information on how university facilities can, want to, or should develop, where, and to what extent.
tr_llm_glsr: Here you will find information about how university facilities can, want to, or should develop, where and to what extent.

de_text: Sie sind auf der Suche nach Ansprechpartnern in Ihrer Einrichtung bezüglich eines Raumtausches/ Mehrbedarf/ Büroumstrukturierung?
en_grtr: On the hunt for contacts in your institute, department or unit regarding a room swap, additional requirements or an office restructure?
tr_llm: Are you looking for contacts in your institution regarding a room exchange, additional needs, or office restructuring?
tr_llm_glsr: Are you searching for contacts in your unit regarding a room exchange, additional space, or office restructuring?

de_text: Raumbeauftragte sind aus den jeweiligen Fakultäten/Fachbereichen benannte Vertreter als zentrale Ansprechpartner und Mittler zwischen Fakultät/Fachbereich und Verwaltung in allen raumbezogenen Fragen (nicht Lehrraumplanung/Veranstaltungen).
en_grtr: Room Officers are nominated by their faculty or department to serve as central points of contact and mediators between the faculty/department and Central Administration on all room- and space-related issues (excluding planning teaching spaces/events).
tr_llm: Room coordinators are designated representatives from the respective faculties or departments, serving as central contacts and mediators between the faculty/department and administration on all space‑related matters (excluding classroom planning or events).
tr_llm_glsr: Room managers are designated representatives from the respective faculties or departments, acting as central contacts and mediators between the faculty/department and administration on all space‑related issues (excluding classroom planning or events).

de_text: In allen Raumfragen ist die Abteilung 4.7 auch Dienstleister und bietet seine Kenntnisse und Erfahrungen den betroffenen Einrichtungen an.
en_grtr: Section 4.7 acts as the central service provider for all room-related issues and offers its expertise and experience to the units affected.
tr_llm: In all spatial matters, Department 4.7 also acts as a service provider and offers its knowledge and experience to the affected facilities.
tr_llm_glsr: In all spatial matters, Section 4.7 also serves as a service provider and offers its expertise and experience to the affected facilities.

de_text: Die Ressource Raum nimmt neben Finanzmitteln und Stellen eine wichtige Position ein, wenn es darum geht, optimale institutionelle Bedingungen für Forschung und Lehre zu schaffen.
en_grtr: Alongside funding and staff posts, space is also key to creating the best possible conditions for research and teaching at the University of Bonn.
tr_llm: Space as a resource occupies an important position alongside financial resources and staff positions when it comes to creating optimal institutional conditions for research and teaching.
tr_llm_glsr: Rooms, a prized resource, alongside financial resources and staff positions, plays a key role in establishing optimal institutional criteria for research and teaching.

de_text: Sie stellt ein äußerst knappes und teures Gut dar.
en_grtr: It is an extremely scarce and expensive commodity.
tr_llm: It represents an extremely scarce and expensive good.
tr_llm_glsr: It is an extremely scarce and expensive commodity.

de_text: Seit 2023 werden nur noch 80% der Bürofläche vom Ministerium für Kultur und Wissenschaft des Landes Nordrhein-Westfalen als genehmigungsfähig anerkannt.
en_grtr: Since 2023, only 80% of the University’s office space has been recognized by the Ministry of Culture and Science of the state of North Rhine-Westphalia (NRW) as being eligible for approval.
tr_llm: Since 2023, only 80% of office space has been recognized as eligible for approval by the Ministry of Culture and Science of the state of North Rhine-Westphalia.
tr_llm_glsr: Since 2023, only 80 % of the office space has been deemed eligible for approval by the Ministry of Culture and Science of the State of North Rhine‑Westphalia.

de_text: Dies gründet u.a. auf den Möglichkeiten von Homeoffice, flexible Arbeitszeitmodelle und den neuen Formen der Bürogestaltung im Rahmen von Desk-Sharing u.w.
en_grtr: This is due not least to the options available for working from home, flexible working-time models and the new forms of office design that embrace desk-sharing and other trends.
tr_llm: This is based, among other things, on the possibilities of home office, flexible working time models, and the new forms of office design within the framework of desk sharing, etc.
tr_llm_glsr: This is based, among other things, on the possibilities of working from home, flexible working‑time models, and new forms of office design such as desk‑sharing, etc.

de_text: An die Bedarfsfeststellung werden strenge Maßstäbe gesetzt, da die Universität Bonn über keine Raumreserven verfügt.
en_grtr: Strict criteria apply when determining room requirements, because the University of Bonn does not hold a reserve of spare space.
tr_llm: Strict standards are applied to the needs assessment, as the University of Bonn has no spare rooms.
tr_llm_glsr: Strict standards are applied to the needs assessment, because the University of Bonn, regarding room reserves, has none.

de_text: Grundsätzlich ist die Lösung einer Raumfrage immer innerhalb der jeweiligen Einrichtung - ggf. in Zusammenarbeit mit den Raumbeauftragten und Abt. 4.7 - anzustreben.
en_grtr: Ideally, staff in a particular institute, department or unit will always endeavor to resolve a room or space issue with their colleagues, liaising with the Room Officers and Section 4.7 as required.
tr_llm: In principle, a solution to a space issue should always be pursued within the respective institution—if necessary in cooperation with the space officers and Department 4.7.
tr_llm_glsr: In principle, a space issue should always be addressed within the respective unit – if necessary in collaboration with the space officers and Dept. 4.7.

de_text: Anträge auf Bereitstellung zusätzlicher Räume durchlaufen immer ein Verfahren zur Bedarfsfeststellung (Flächenbilanzierung und Kennwertverfahren), ggf. mit einer Bewertung der tatsächlichen Situation vor Ort.
en_grtr: All requests for the provision of additional rooms undergo a needs analysis (extent accounting and parameter-based method for determining space requirements), if necessary including an assessment of the actual situation on the ground.
tr_llm: Requests for the provision of additional rooms always undergo a needs assessment procedure (area accounting and key‑figure method), possibly including an evaluation of the actual on‑site situation.
tr_llm_glsr: Requests for additional rooms always go through a needs determination process (area accounting and Parameter-based space requirements calculation), possibly including an assessment of the actual situation at the venue.

de_text: Das Ergebnis dieses Verfahrens entscheidet darüber, ob einer Universitätseinrichtung zusätzliche Räume zur Verfügung gestellt werden (können).
en_grtr: The results of this process determine whether additional rooms will or can be provided to an institute, department or unit at the University.
tr_llm: The result of this procedure determines whether additional rooms can be provided to a university institution.
tr_llm_glsr: The result of this procedure determines whether a university institution can be provided with additional rooms.

de_text: Es werden durch die Abteilung 4.7 regelmäßige Datenaktualisierungen durchgeführt (alle zwei Jahre).
en_grtr: Section 4.7 carries out regular data updates (every two years).
tr_llm: Regular data updates are carried out by department 4.7 (every two years).
tr_llm_glsr: Section 4.7 carries out regular data updates (every two years).

de_text: Das Kennwertverfahren ist ein vom MKW (Ministerium für Kultur und Wissenschaft des Landes Nordrhein-Westfalen) vorgegebenes Tool zur Flächenbedarfsermittlung.
en_grtr: The parameter-based method is a tool for determining space requirements whose use is prescribed by the Ministry of Culture and Science of NRW (MKW).
tr_llm: The Kennwertverfahren is a tool for determining area requirements prescribed by the MKW (Ministry of Culture and Science of the State of North Rhine-Westphalia).
tr_llm_glsr: The Parameter-based space requirements calculation is a tool prescribed by the MKW (Ministry of Culture and Science of the State of North Rhine‑Westphalia) for determining space needs.

de_text: Es ermöglicht die Größenordnung der verschiedenen Nutzflächen (NUF 1-6) zu bestimmen, die die fachlichen Einrichtungen für Forschung, Lehre und Weiterbildung sowie den zentralen Hochschulbibliotheken und zentralen Hochschulverwaltungen benötigen.
en_grtr: It enables a calculation of how much of the various categories of usable space (NUF 1–6) is required by the University’s institutes, departments and units for research, teaching and continual professional development and by its libraries and Central Administration teams.
tr_llm: It enables the determination of the scale of the various usable areas (NUF 1‑6) required by the academic units for research, teaching and further education, as well as the central university libraries and central university administrations.
tr_llm_glsr: It enables the determination of the scale of the various usable areas (NUF 1‑6) required by the academic units for Research, Teaching and Continual professional development, as well as by the central university libraries and central university administrations.

de_text: Das Kennwertverfahren ist Grundlage zur Beantragung zusätzlicher Flächen der Universität.
en_grtr: Any applications for additional University space will be based on this method.
tr_llm: The key figure method is the basis for applying for additional university space.
tr_llm_glsr: Any applications for additional University space will be based on this method.

de_text: Bei allen Fragen grundsätzlicher Art, Problemen oder Unklarheiten rund um das Thema Flächenentwicklung wenden Sie sich bitte an Fr. Scheffenborn oder Herrn Wyrwa.
en_grtr: Please contact Sophie Scheffenborn or Sebastian Wyrwa if you have any general questions, problems or doubts regarding land development.
tr_llm: For any fundamental questions, problems, or uncertainties regarding the topic of area development, please contact Ms. Scheffenborn or Mr. Wyrwa.
tr_llm_glsr: For any fundamental questions, problems, or uncertainties concerning the topic of land development, please contact Ms. Scheffenborn or Mr. Wyrwa.

de_text: Sie suchen Informationen und Hilfe zur Vergabe oder Reservierung der Uni-Räume?
en_grtr: Looking for information on and help with allocating or booking rooms at the University?
tr_llm: Are you looking for information and assistance regarding the allocation or reservation of university rooms?
tr_llm_glsr: Are you looking for information and help about allocating or reserving university rooms?

de_text: Sie suchen Informationen zu den Standorten und Gebäude der Universität?
en_grtr: Looking for information on the University’s various sites and buildings?
tr_llm: Are you looking for information about the university's locations and buildings?
tr_llm_glsr: Looking for information on the University’s various sites and buildings?

de_text: Aufzug fährt nicht, Heizung bleibt kalt oder Sie haben eine andere technische Störung im Gebäude bzw. der -Infrastruktur?
en_grtr: Is your elevator stuck? Is your heating not coming on? Or maybe you’re experiencing a different kind of technical problem in your building or building infrastructure.
tr_llm: Elevator not working, heating stays cold, or you have another technical problem in the building or the infrastructure?
tr_llm_glsr: Elevator not working, Heating stays cold, or you have another technical fault in the building or the infrastructure?

de_text: Sie sind noch nicht für das Meldeportal freigeschaltet?
en_grtr: Not yet been given access to the reporting portal?
tr_llm: You are not yet authorized for the reporting portal?
tr_llm_glsr: You have not yet been given access to the reporting portal?

de_text: Der Benutzername und das Passwort werden an die o.a. E-Mail-Adresse versendet.
en_grtr: Your user name and password will be sent to the email address entered above.
tr_llm: The username and password are sent to the above-mentioned email address.
tr_llm_glsr: The username and password are sent to the above‑mentioned Email address.

de_text: Verwenden Sie bitte ausschließlich eine E-Mail-Adresse, auf die lediglich Sie als Antragsteller*in Zugriff haben!
en_grtr: Please only specify an email address to which you—as the person making the request—have sole access.
tr_llm: Please use only an email address that only you, as the applicant, have access to.
tr_llm_glsr: Please use only an email address that only you, as the applicant, have access to!

de_text: Bei allen technischen Fragen rund um das Meldeportal stehen Ihnen die Mitarbeiter*innen des Fachbereichs CAFM gerne zur Verfügung.
en_grtr: Please do not hesitate to contact the CAFM team if you have any technical questions about the reporting portal.
tr_llm: For any technical questions about the reporting portal, the staff of the CAFM department are happy to assist you.
tr_llm_glsr: If you have any technical questions about the reporting portal, the staff of the CAFM department are happy to help.

de_text: Hiermit wird bestätigt, dass gefährliche Reaktionen des o.g. Gemisches ausgeschlossen sind und der Behälter zur Entsorgung freigegeben werden kann.
en_grtr: I hereby confirm that the mixture specified above will not trigger a dangerous reaction and that the container can be approved for disposal.
tr_llm: This confirms that dangerous reactions of the above-mentioned mixture are ruled out and the container can be released for disposal.
tr_llm_glsr: This confirms that dangerous reactions of the aforementioned mixture are ruled out and the container can be released for disposal.

de_text: Die Abfälle, die in meinem Verantwortungsbereich anfallen, wurden anhand der Entsorgungsrichtlinie bewertet.
en_grtr: The waste generated within my area of responsibility has been assessed in line with the waste disposal guidelines.
tr_llm: The waste generated within my area of responsibility was evaluated according to the disposal guidelines.
tr_llm_glsr: The waste generated within my area of responsibility was evaluated according to the Waste Disposal Guidelines.

de_text: Das Ergebnis ist in der folgenden Tabelle dokumentiert.
en_grtr: The results are recorded in the table below.
tr_llm: The result is documented in the table below.
tr_llm_glsr: The results are recorded in the table below.

de_text: Sofern eine angegebene Abfallgruppe den Abfall nicht eindeutig klassifiziert, habe ich das Formular für „Nicht zuzuordnende Abfälle“ ausgefüllt.
en_grtr: Where a waste group indicated does not classify the waste beyond any ambiguity, I have filled in the “Non-Classifiable Chemical Waste” form.
tr_llm: If a specified waste group does not clearly classify the waste, I have filled out the form for “Unclassifiable waste.”
tr_llm_glsr: If a specified waste group does not clearly classify the waste, I filled out the form for “Unassignable waste.”

de_text: Ich werde sicherstellen, dass die Einstufung der Abfälle regelmäßig (d.h. mindestens einmal jährlich) überprüft wird.
en_grtr: I will ensure that the waste classification is checked regularly (i.e. at least once a year).
tr_llm: I will ensure that the waste classification is reviewed regularly (i.e., at least once a year).
tr_llm_glsr: I will ensure that the classification of the waste is reviewed regularly (i.e., at least once every year).

de_text: Sollte sich diese Einstufung ändern, z.B. durch Veränderung der Arbeitsverfahren, werde ich sicherstellen, dass die Abteilung 4.1 umgehend informiert wird.
en_grtr: If this classification changes, e.g. due to changes in working methods, I will make sure that Section 4.1 is notified without delay.
tr_llm: Should this classification change, for example due to changes in the work procedures, I will ensure that department 4.1 is informed immediately.
tr_llm_glsr: Should this classification be modified, for example due to changes in the work procedures, I will ensure that Section 4.1 is informed immediately.

de_text: Bis zu diesem Zeitpunkt ist die Einstufung verbindlich.
en_grtr: Unless and until this happens, the classification is binding.
tr_llm: Until this point, the classification is binding.
tr_llm_glsr: Unless and until this happens, the classification is binding.

de_text: Außerdem versichere ich, dass ich für alle Abfälle, die in meinem Verantwortungsbereich anfallen, bis zur Entsorgung sicherstelle, dass von den Behältern oder deren Inhalt keinerlei Gefahren für Personen oder die Umwelt ausgehen können.
en_grtr: I also confirm that, for all the waste generated within my area of responsibility, I will make sure that neither the containers nor their contents can pose any risk whatsoever to people or the environment.
tr_llm: Furthermore, I certify that for all waste generated within my area of responsibility, I will ensure, until disposal, that neither the containers nor their contents pose any danger to people or the environment.
tr_llm_glsr: Furthermore, I certify that for all waste generated within my area of responsibility, up to disposal, I ensure that neither the containers nor their contents pose any danger to people or the environment.

de_text: Außerdem versichere ich, dass ich bis zur Entsorgung sicherstelle, dass von den Behältern oder deren Inhalt keinerlei Gefahr für Personen oder die Umwelt ausgehen kann.
en_grtr: I also hereby confirm that I shall ensure that neither the containers nor their contents can pose any risk whatsoever to people or the environment right up until the waste is disposed of.
tr_llm: Furthermore, I assure that I will ensure that, until disposal, the containers or their contents pose no danger to people or the environment.
tr_llm_glsr: Furthermore, I assure that I, to the Disposal, ensure that no danger to persons or the environment can arise from the containers or their Contents.

de_text: Wird für die Aufstellung der Container Datum/Uhrzeit nicht angegeben, wird der Container innerhalb von 48 Std. morgens um 08:00 Uhr angeliefert.
en_grtr: if no date or time is specified for setting up the container, it will be delivered within 48 hours and arrive at 8 am.
tr_llm: If no date/time is given for the container's placement, the container will be delivered within 48 hours, at 8:00 a.m.
tr_llm_glsr: If the Date/Time for the Setup of the Containers is not specified, the container will be delivered within 48 hours, in the morning at 08:00.

de_text: Wenn kein Datum für die Abholung genannt wird, bitten wir Sie, sich bei Abholungs- wunsch mit uns in Verbindung zu setzten.
en_grtr: If no date is specified for pickup, please contact us if you would like to arrange a pickup.
tr_llm: If no date for the pickup is mentioned, we ask you to get in touch with us regarding your pickup request.
tr_llm_glsr: If no Date for the Pickup is given, please contact us about your Pickup request.

de_text: Mit meiner Unterschrift bestätige ich, dass der Abfall den in der Entsorgungsrichtlinie genannten Kriterien entspricht und dass zum Entsorgungstermin ein Mitarbeiter als Ansprechpartner zur Verfügung steht.
en_grtr: By signing, I confirm that the waste meets the criteria in the waste disposal guidelines and that a member of staff will be available to act as a point of contact at the time of disposal.
tr_llm: By signing, I confirm that the waste meets the criteria specified in the disposal guidelines and that a staff member will be available as a contact person on the disposal date.
tr_llm_glsr: By my Signature I confirm that the waste meets the criteria set out in the Waste Disposal Guidelines and that a staff member will be available as a Contact on the disposal date.

de_text: Wichtig: Hier die Behälter angeben, die nicht den Gefahrguttransportvorgaben entsprechen (beschädigt oder Kunststoffbehälter älter als 5 Jahre).
en_grtr: Here you should list the containers that do not comply with the transport regulations for dangerous goods (because they are damaged or more than five years old and made of plastic).
tr_llm: Important: List here the containers that do not meet the hazardous material transport regulations (damaged or plastic containers older than five years).
tr_llm_glsr: N.B.: List the containers here that do not comply with hazardous‑material transport requirements (damaged or plastic containers older than five years).

de_text: Die oben angegebenen Behälter sind mit mindestens einer intakten Plombe versehen.
en_grtr: The containers listed above are fitted with at least one intact seal.
tr_llm: The containers listed above are equipped with at least one intact seal.
tr_llm_glsr: The containers listed above are fitted with at least one intact seal.

de_text: Zur Identifizierung des ausgebauten Filters bitte auf die Verpackung eine Kopie dieses vollständig ausgefüllten Formulars kleben!
en_grtr: Please stick a copy of this form to the packaging once it has been completed in full in order to identify the filter that has been removed.
tr_llm: To identify the removed filter, please attach a copy of this fully completed form to the packaging!
tr_llm_glsr: To identify the removed filter, please attach a copy of this fully completed form to the packaging.

tr_llm: The waste listed on page 2 is hereby registered for disposal.
tr_llm_glsr: The waste listed on Page 2 is hereby registered for disposal.

de_text: Mit der Unterschrift wird bestätigt, dass es sich um Abfälle oder Abfallgemische handelt, bei denen aufgrund der Zusammensetzung gefährliche Reaktionen auszuschließen sind.
en_grtr: By signing, I confirm that the waste or mixtures of wastes involved cannot trigger a dangerous reaction on account of its/their composition.
tr_llm: By signing, it is confirmed that the waste or waste mixtures are such that dangerous reactions can be excluded due to their composition.
tr_llm_glsr: The Signature confirms that the material is waste or waste mixtures for which dangerous reactions can be ruled out because of the Composition.

de_text: Insbesondere organische Flüssigkeiten bzw. Lösemittel enthalten keine Peroxide.

tr_llm_glsr: In particular, there are no organic liquids and/or solvents that contain peroxides.

en_grtr: I hereby confirm that I shall ensure that neither the containers nor their contents can pose any risk whatsoever to people or the environment right up until the waste is disposed of.
tr_llm: I certify that, until disposal, I will ensure that the containers or their contents pose no danger to people or the environment.
tr_llm_glsr: I certify that, up to disposal, I will ensure that the containers or their contents present no danger to people or the environment.

de_text: Diese sind direkt vom Institut an den Vermieter zurückzugeben!

tr_llm_glsr: These must be returned directly to the landlord, dated by the Institute!

de_text: Hiermit bestätige ich, dass alle mit diesem Entsorgungsantrag angemeldeten Sonderabfälle von der Abteilung 4.1 - Zentrale Serviceaufgaben entsorgt wurden.
en_grtr: I hereby confirm that all the special waste reported in this waste disposal request has been disposed of by Section 4.1—Infrastructure and Facility Services.
tr_llm: I hereby confirm that all special waste reported with this disposal request has been disposed of by Department 4.1 – Central Service Tasks.
tr_llm_glsr: I hereby confirm that all special waste registered with this disposal request have been disposed of by Section 4.1 – Central Service Tasks.

en_grtr: Radioactive substances and infectious waste cannot be disposed of via the usual channels.

tr_llm_glsr: Radioactive substances and infectious waste are excluded from disposal.

de_text: Darin eingeschlossen sind Laborabfälle, Abfälle aus dem Erhalt und Pflege der Gebäude und Flächen, Rest- bzw. Siedlungsabfall, Papier- und Kartonagen, Transportverpackungen sowie diverse andere Abfälle.
en_grtr: including laboratory waste, waste from maintaining and looking after buildings and spaces, general and residential waste, paper and cardboard, transport packaging and waste of many other kinds.
tr_llm: Included are laboratory waste, waste from the maintenance and care of buildings and areas, municipal (residential) waste, paper and cardboard, transport packaging, and various other wastes.
tr_llm_glsr: Included are laboratory waste, waste from the maintenance and upkeep of the building and its grounds, residual (municipal) waste, Paper and cardboard, Transport packaging, and various other waste.

de_text: Die vorliegende Richtlinie stellt Ihnen die Organisation der Abfallwirtschaft innerhalb der Universität Bonn vor und gibt Ihnen Hilfestellung bei der Einstufung und Entsorgung von Abfällen.
en_grtr: These guidelines explain how waste management is organized at the University of Bonn and will help you to categorize and dispose of your waste.
tr_llm: This guideline presents the organization of waste management within the University of Bonn and provides you with assistance in the classification and disposal of waste.
tr_llm_glsr: This guideline introduces the organization of waste management at the University of Bonn and provides assistance with waste classification and Disposal.

de_text: Nicht nur der wirtschaftliche Aspekt, sondern ebenso der Umweltgedanke verpflichtet die Universität Bonn zur Einhaltung der Grundsätze der Kreislaufwirtschaft.
en_grtr: That the University of Bonn is committed to upholding the principles of the circular economy is down not only to economic considerations but also, and in particular, the environmental aspect.
tr_llm: Not only the economic aspect, but also the environmental consideration obliges the University of Bonn to adhere to the principles of the circular economy.
tr_llm_glsr: Not only the economic aspect, but also the environmental concern obliges the University of Bonn to adhere to the basic principles of the circular economy.

de_text: Abfälle sind in erster Linie zu vermeiden, in zweiter Linie zu verwerten und erst in letzter Instanz zu beseitigen.
en_grtr: Waste must ideally be avoided. If this is not possible, it must be recycled, and only as a last resort is it to be disposed of.
tr_llm: Waste should first be avoided, then recovered, and only as a last resort be disposed of.
tr_llm_glsr: Waste should first be avoided, then recovered, and only as a last resort be disposed of.

de_text: Im Hochschulbereich kann unter Beachtung dieser Grundsätze das Abfallaufkommen nicht nur erheblich reduziert, sondern darüber hinaus ebenso die Entsorgungskosten minimiert werden.
en_grtr: Adhering to these principles will enable the University not only to significantly reduce the amount of waste it generates but also to minimize the costs for disposing of it.
tr_llm: In the higher education sector, by observing these principles, waste generation can not only be significantly reduced, but also disposal costs can be minimized.
tr_llm_glsr: In the higher education sector, by observing these basic principles, waste generation can not only be significantly reduced, but also disposal costs can be minimized.

de_text: Demnach sollte schon vor dem Neukauf von Einrichtungsgegenständen, Apparaturen oder elektrischen/elektronischen Geräten auf einen möglichen Entsorgungsweg der Altgeräte geachtet werden.
en_grtr: Even before buying any new appliances, apparatus or electric/electronic devices, therefore, institutes, departments and units should consider how they might dispose of their old equipment.
tr_llm: Therefore, even before purchasing new furniture, appliances, or electrical/electronic devices, one should consider a possible disposal method for the old equipment.
tr_llm_glsr: Accordingly, even before buying new furnishings, apparatuses, or electrical/electronic devices, one should consider the possible disposal method for the old equipment.

de_text: Viele Anbieter nehmen auf Anfrage die alten Geräte im Austausch zurück.
en_grtr: Many providers will take it back if you ask them.
tr_llm: Many providers will, upon request, take back the old devices in exchange.
tr_llm_glsr: Many providers will take it back if you ask them.

de_text: Bitte informieren Sie sich daher bei Neuanschaffungen, Wartungsarbeiten oder Reparaturen immer bei ihrem jeweiligen Dienstleister, ob dieser Entsorgungsservice angeboten wird, und setzen Sie sich mit der Abteilung 4.1 – Sachgebiet Entsorgung und Gefahrgut in Verbindung.
en_grtr: This means that, when making a new purchase or commissioning maintenance or repair work, you should always ask your service provider whether they offer such a disposal service and get in touch with Section 4.1, Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit.
tr_llm: Therefore, when acquiring new equipment, carrying out maintenance or repairs, always check with your respective service provider whether they offer a disposal service, and get in touch with Department 4.1 – Waste Disposal and Hazardous Materials.
tr_llm_glsr: Therefore, whenever you acquire new equipment, perform maintenance, or carry out repairs, please always check with your respective service provider whether they offer a disposal service, and get in touch with Section 4.1 – Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit.

de_text: Seit der deutschlandweiten Umstellung von der Abfallentsorgung auf die differenziertere Abfallwirtschaft liegt das Hauptaugenmerk auf der Reduzierung der Abfallmengen zur Beseitigung.
en_grtr: Since Germany switched from disposing of all its waste to a more nuanced approach to waste management, the focus has been on reducing the amount of waste requiring disposal.
tr_llm: Since Germany's nationwide shift from waste disposal to a more differentiated waste management system, the main focus has been on reducing the amount of waste to be disposed of.
tr_llm_glsr: Since the nationwide shift from waste disposal to a more differentiated waste management system, the main focus has been on reducing the amounts of waste destined for disposal.

de_text: Eine Maßnahme ist es, die Abfälle zu sortieren, zu trennen und einer Verwertung zu kommen zu lassen, z. B. getrenntes Sammeln der Kunststoffabfälle.
en_grtr: One way of doing this is to sort and separate waste and arrange for it to be re-used, e.g. by collecting different kinds of plastic waste separately.
tr_llm: One measure is to sort the waste, separate it, and make it available for recycling, e.g., separate collection of plastic waste.
tr_llm_glsr: An Action is to sort the waste, separate it, and bring it to utilization, e.g., separate collection of plastic waste.

de_text: Das Weiter- oder Wiederverwenden von Gegenständen oder Chemikalien kann über sogenannte Tausch-, Altgeräte- oder Chemikalienbörsen organisiert werden.
en_grtr: There exist websites and other platforms for arranging the continued use or re-use of old equipment or chemicals.
tr_llm: The further or reuse of items or chemicals can be organized through so-called exchange, used‑equipment, or chemical exchanges.
tr_llm_glsr: Further or repeated use of items or chemicals can be organized regarding so-called exchange, used‑device, or chemical exchanges.

de_text: Zudem ist es bei Bestellungen von Chemikalien ratsam, nur die tatsächlich benötigte Menge zu bestellen, um hohe Entsorgungskosten zu vermeiden.
en_grtr: When buying chemicals, it is also a good idea not to order any more than is required in order to avoid high disposal costs.
tr_llm: Furthermore, when ordering chemicals, it is advisable to order only the amount actually needed in order to avoid high disposal costs.
tr_llm_glsr: Moreover, when ordering chemicals, it is advisable to order only the amount actually needed to avoid high disposal costs.

de_text: Diese Richtlinie regelt die ordnungsgemäße Sammlung und Entsorgung von Abfällen.
en_grtr: These guidelines explain how to collect and dispose of waste correctly.
tr_llm: This policy regulates the proper collection and disposal of waste.
tr_llm_glsr: These guidelines explain how to collect and dispose of waste correctly.

de_text: Teil A erörtert die Abfallgruppen und die Entsorgung von nicht chemischen Abfällen wie gemischte Siedlungsabfälle (Restmüll), Altpapier oder Elektronikschrott und gilt für die Rheinische Friedrich-Wilhelms-Universität Bonn.
en_grtr: Part A covers the various waste groups for and the disposal of non-chemical waste such as mixed residential waste (general waste), used paper or e-waste and applies to the University of Bonn.
tr_llm: Part A discusses the waste categories and the disposal of non‑chemical waste such as mixed municipal waste (residual waste), waste paper, or electronic scrap and applies to the Rheinische Friedrich‑Wilhelms‑University Bonn.
tr_llm_glsr: Part A discusses the waste categories and the disposal of non‑chemical waste such as mixed municipal waste (residual waste), waste paper, or e‑waste, and applies to the University of Bonn.

de_text: Teil B erörtert die Abfallgruppen und die Entsorgung von chemischen Abfällen, die in der Regel in Laboratorien oder Werkstätten anfallen.
en_grtr: Part B covers the various waste groups for and the disposal of chemical waste, which is usually generated in laboratories or workshops.
tr_llm: Part B discusses the waste categories and the disposal of chemical waste that typically arise in laboratories or workshops.
tr_llm_glsr: Part B discusses the waste categories and the Disposal of chemical waste that typically arises in laboratories or workshops.

de_text: Dieser Teil gilt für die Rheinische Friedrich-Wilhelms-Universität Bonn, das Universitätsklinikum Bonn sowie die Stiftung zool. Forschungsmuseum Alexander Koenig.
en_grtr: This part applies to the University of Bonn, the University Hospital Bonn and the Zoological Research Museum Alexander Koenig Foundation.
tr_llm: This part applies to the Rheinische Friedrich‑Wilhelm University Bonn, the University Hospital Bonn, and the Alexander Koenig Zoological Research Museum Foundation.
tr_llm_glsr: This part applies to the University of Bonn, the University Hospital Bonn, and the Alexander Koenig Zoological Research Museum Foundation.

de_text: Die chemischen Abfälle sind regelmäßig (d. h. mindestens einmal jährlich) auf ihre Zusammensetzung zu überprüfen.
en_grtr: The composition of chemical waste must be checked regularly (i.e. at least once a year).
tr_llm: The chemical waste must be regularly (i.e., at least once a year) checked for its composition.
tr_llm_glsr: The chemical waste must be regularly (i.e., at least once every year) checked for its composition.

de_text: Ebenso ist bei den nicht chemischen Abfällen in regelmäßigen Abständen zu überprüfen, ob die von Ihnen angegebenen Abfallmengen dem aktuellen Stand und die Abfallarten den Vorgaben der Richtlinie weiterhin entsprechen.
en_grtr: Non-chemical waste must also be checked regularly to verify whether the amounts of waste that you have indicated are still accurate and the types of waste continue to comply with the provisions of these guidelines.
tr_llm: Similarly, for non‑chemical waste, it must be regularly checked whether the waste quantities you have provided are current and whether the waste types still meet the directive's requirements.
tr_llm_glsr: Likewise, for non‑chemical waste, it should be verified regularly whether the waste quantities you have provided are in line with the current last revised figures and whether the waste types continue to meet the directive’s criteria.

de_text: Eine Veränderung in Bezug auf Abfallart oder -menge ist der Abteilung 4.1 – Sachgebiet Entsorgung und Gefahrgut zeitnah schriftlich mitzuteilen.
en_grtr: Any change of type or amount of waste must be communicated promptly to Section 4.1, Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit in writing.
tr_llm: Any change concerning waste type or quantity must be reported in writing to Department 4.1 – Disposal and Hazardous Materials promptly.
tr_llm_glsr: Any change concerning the type of waste or the amount must be reported in writing to Section 4.1 – Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit promptly.

de_text: Um die Abfallmengen und somit ein entstehendes Gefahrenpotenzial gering zu halten, wird eine regelmäßige Entsorgung der entstehenden Abfälle empfohlen.
en_grtr: The regular disposal of all waste generated is recommended in order to minimize the amount of waste and thus any hazard it might pose.
tr_llm: To keep waste quantities and thus the resulting hazard potential low, regular disposal of the generated waste is recommended.
tr_llm_glsr: To keep waste quantities and thus the emerging hazard potential low, regular disposal of the generated waste is recommended.

de_text: Die Richtlinie gilt für alle hier beschriebenen Abfälle.
en_grtr: The guidelines apply to all kinds of waste described in this document.
tr_llm: The guideline applies to all waste described here.
tr_llm_glsr: The guidelines apply to all kinds of waste described in this document.

de_text: Entstehen Abfälle, die nicht in dieser Richtlinie aufgeführt sind, so ist zur Gewährleistung der Entsorgungssicherheit rechtzeitig und vorab Kontakt mit dem Sachgebiet Entsorgung und Gefahrgut aufzunehmen.
en_grtr: If you encounter waste that is not covered by these guidelines, you must contact the Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit in good time and before disposing of it to make sure that this is done safely.
tr_llm: If waste arises that is not listed in this directive, contact the disposal and hazardous goods department in a timely and prior manner to ensure disposal safety.
tr_llm_glsr: If waste arises that is not listed in this guideline, contact the Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit promptly and beforehand to ensure disposal safety.

de_text: Uranylacetat als Chemikalie, gebrauchsfertige Lösungen und verunreinigte Betriebsmittel fallen ebenfalls hierunter.
en_grtr: This also includes uranyl acetate for use as a chemical, ready-to-use solutions and contaminated equipment or operating materials.
tr_llm: Uranyl acetate as a chemical, ready-to-use solutions, and contaminated operating supplies also fall under this.
tr_llm_glsr: Uranyl acetate as a chemical, ready-to-use solutions, and contaminated operating materials also fall under this category.

de_text: Hilfestellung bieten die Stabsstellen Strahlenschutz, jede für Ihren Bereich Universität Bonn und Universitätsklinikum Bonn getrennt.
en_grtr: For assistance, please contact either of the Radiation Protection Units, one of which is responsible for the University of Bonn and the other for the University Hospital Bonn.
tr_llm: The radiation protection offices provide assistance, each for its own area, the University of Bonn and the University Hospital Bonn, separately.
tr_llm_glsr: Radiation protection staff units provide assistance, each for its own team—the University of Bonn and the University Hospital Bonn—separately.

de_text: Hilfestellung bietet die Abfallwirtschaft des Universitätsklinikums Bonn.
en_grtr: Please contact the University Hospital Bonn’s Waste Management team for assistance.
tr_llm: Assistance is offered by the waste management of the University Hospital Bonn.
tr_llm_glsr: Please contact the University Hospital Bonn’s Waste Management team for assistance.

de_text: Betäubungsmittel Hilfestellung bietet § 16 Betäubungsmittelgesetz (BtMG), Betriebsärztlicher Dienst (Tel.: 287–16176).
en_grtr: Anesthetics/narcotic drugs For assistance, please consult § 16 of the Narcotic Drugs Act (Betäubungsmittelgesetz, BtMG) and/or the staff physicians office (phone: 287-16176).
tr_llm: Narcotics assistance is provided by § 16 Narcotics Act (BtMG), Occupational Health Service (Tel.: 287–16176).
tr_llm_glsr: Assistance with narcotics is provided under § 16 of the Narcotics Act (BtMG) by the Staff physicians office (Phone: 287‑16176).

de_text: Diese Abfälle werden in der Regel innerhalb der gentechnischen Anlage bzw. des Labors autoklaviert,– Hilfestellung bietet für den Bereich der Universität Bonn die Stabsstelle - Arbeits- und Umweltschutz, für das Universitätsklinikum Bonn die Stabsstelle - Arbeitsschutz.
en_grtr: This waste is generally autoclaved in the relevant genetic engineering facility or laboratory. For assistance, please contact the Occupational Safety and Environmental Protection Unit for the University of Bonn or the Occupational Safety Unit for the University Hospital Bonn.
tr_llm: These wastes are usually autoclaved within the genetic engineering facility or the laboratory – assistance for the University of Bonn is provided by the staff unit for Occupational and Environmental Protection, and for the University Hospital Bonn by the staff unit for Occupational Safety.
tr_llm_glsr: These wastes are usually autoclaved within the genetic engineering Enclosed or the laboratory. Assistance for the Team at the University of Bonn is provided by the Unit – Occupational health and safety and environmental‑protection, and for the University Hospital Bonn by the Unit – Occupational health and safety.

de_text: Diese Aufstellung beinhaltet nur die wichtigsten Bestimmungen und erhebt keinen Anspruch auf Vollständigkeit.
en_grtr: This list contains only the most important regulations and makes no claim to be complete.
tr_llm: This list contains only the most important provisions and does not claim to be complete.
tr_llm_glsr: This setup includes only the most important provisions and does not claim to be exhaustive.

de_text: Die in dieser Richtlinie genannten Anforderungen und Rahmenbedingungen sind verpflichtend für jeden einzelnen Abfallerzeuger.
en_grtr: The requirements and conditions set out in these guidelines are binding on anyone generating waste (the “waste producer”).
tr_llm: The requirements and framework conditions mentioned in this policy are mandatory for every individual waste generator.
tr_llm_glsr: The requirements and general information set out in this guideline are mandatory for every waste producer.

de_text: Die Verantwortung des Abfallerzeugers für den Abfall endet erst mit der ordnungsgemäßen Beseitigung oder Verwertung.
en_grtr: They do not stop being responsible for their waste until it has been correctly disposed of, re-used or recycled.
tr_llm: The waste producer's responsibility for the waste ends only with proper disposal or recovery.
tr_llm_glsr: The waste producer's responsibility for the waste ends only upon proper disposal or utilization.

de_text: Die Übergabe der Abfälle an die Abteilung 4.1 oder sonstige Dritte entbindet nicht dieser Verantwortung.
en_grtr: Handing waste over to Section 4.1 or other third parties does not constitute a release from this responsibility.
tr_llm: The transfer of the waste to Department 4.1 or other third parties does not relieve this responsibility.
tr_llm_glsr: The handover of the waste to Section 4.1 or other third parties does not relieve this responsibility.

de_text: Die Abteilung 4.1 – Sachgebiet Entsorgung und Gefahrgut ist als behördlicher Ansprechpartner und federführendes Bindeglied im Bereich Entsorgung verpflichtet, die Reihenfolge der Abfallwirtschafts - Grundsätze und alle weiteren rechtlichen Vorgaben einzuhalten und daher dem allgemeinen Umweltgedanken Rechnung zu tragen.
en_grtr: As the point of contact for the authorities and the lead member of the waste disposal organization, Section 4.1, Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit is required to observe the hierarchy of waste management principles and all other statutory provisions and thus to support the general environmental cause.
tr_llm: Department 4.1 – Waste Disposal and Hazardous Materials is, as the official point of contact and leading liaison in the field of disposal, required to observe the hierarchy of waste‑management principles and all other legal regulations, thereby taking the overall environmental concern into account.
tr_llm_glsr: Section 4.1, Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit, as the official contact and leading liaison in the waste disposal team, is obliged to adhere to the sequence of waste‑management basic principles and all other legal criteria, thereby taking the overall environmental consideration into account.

de_text: Es ist bindend, die Abteilung 4.1 – Sachgebiet Entsorgung und Gefahrgut bei allen Entsorgungsvorgängen zu informieren und einzubinden.
en_grtr: Section 4.1, Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit must be notified of and involved in all waste disposal measures.
tr_llm: It is mandatory to inform and involve Department 4.1 – Waste Disposal and Hazardous Materials in all disposal operations.
tr_llm_glsr: It is mandatory to inform and involve Section 4.1, Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit in all waste disposal processes.

de_text: Die Abwicklung von Entsorgungsvorgängen erfolgt federführend durch das Sachgebiet Entsorgung und Gefahrgut.
en_grtr: The Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit is to take the lead in handling waste disposal measures.
tr_llm: The handling of disposal procedures is led by the Waste Disposal and Hazardous Materials department.
tr_llm_glsr: The processing of waste disposal procedures is primarily carried out by the Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit.

de_text: Die Beauftragung von externen Entsorgungsunternehmen erfolgt ausschließlich durch das Sachgebiet Entsorgung und Gefahrgut.
en_grtr: Only the Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit may engage external waste disposal companies.
tr_llm: The commissioning of external waste disposal companies is carried out exclusively by the waste disposal and hazardous materials department.
tr_llm_glsr: The commissioning of external waste disposal firms is carried out exclusively by the Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit.

de_text: Bei eigenständiger Beauftragung oder der Nichteinhaltung von Vorgaben, behält sich das Sachgebiet Entsorgung und Gefahrgut vor, das betreffende Institut an den Entsorgungskosten zu beteiligen.
en_grtr: Where an institute or department has ordered work itself or breached regulations, the Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit reserves the right to require the institute or department concerned to contribute to the costs.
tr_llm: In the case of independent commissioning or failure to comply with specifications, the Department of Waste Disposal and Hazardous Materials reserves the right to involve the relevant institute in the disposal costs.
tr_llm_glsr: If there is independent commissioning or non‑compliance with the criteria, the Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit reserves the right to require the concerned Institute to share in the disposal costs.

de_text: Es ist Aufgabe des Instituts, das Sachgebiet Entsorgung und Gefahrgut der Abteilung 4.1 über alle anfallenden chemischen und nicht chemischen Abfälle schriftlich zu informieren.
en_grtr: The institute or department is responsible for notifying Section 4.1, Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit of any chemical or non-chemical waste that it generates.
tr_llm: It is the institute's responsibility to inform the waste disposal and hazardous materials unit of Department 4.1 in writing about all chemical and non‑chemical waste generated.
tr_llm_glsr: The institute's duties include informing the Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit of Section 4.1 in writing regarding all chemical and non‑chemical waste.

de_text: Dies beinhaltet die Abfallart/-zusammensetzung, Menge und den voraussichtlichen Entsorgungsturnus oder den erwünschten Abholtermin bei einer Entsorgung.
en_grtr: This includes the type/composition of the waste, its amount and the expected frequency of its disposal or, as appropriate, the desired date and time of pickup for disposal.
tr_llm: This includes the waste type/composition, quantity, and the expected disposal schedule or the desired collection date for a disposal.
tr_llm_glsr: This includes the type of waste/composition, quantity, and the expected disposal schedule or the desired pick‑up date for a disposal.

de_text: Jeder Abfallerzeuger ist verpflichtet, die einzelnen Abfallarten derart getrennt zu sammeln, dass insbesondere bei den chemischen Abfällen gefährliche Reaktionen ausgeschlossen sind.
en_grtr: All waste producers are required to collect up individual types of waste separately in such a way that hazardous chemical reactions are avoided, especially involving chemical waste.
tr_llm: Every waste generator is required to collect the different types of waste separately in such a way that, especially for chemical waste, dangerous reactions are excluded.
tr_llm_glsr: Every waste producer is required to collect each type of waste separately so that, in particular, dangerous reactions are excluded for chemical waste.

de_text: Die in der Entsorgungsrichtlinie aufgeführten Abfallarten entbinden die Abfallerzeuger nicht von dieser Überprüfung.
en_grtr: The types of waste listed in these waste disposal guidelines do not release waste producers from this duty to check.
tr_llm: The waste types listed in the disposal directive do not exempt waste generators from this review.
tr_llm_glsr: The waste types listed in the Waste Disposal Guidelines do not exempt waste producers from this review.

de_text: Verantwortlich für die Umsetzung der Vorgaben der Entsorgungsrichtlinie sind Personen mit Verfügungsbefugnis über räumliche, finanzielle und/oder personelle Ressourcen.
en_grtr: Responsibility for ensuring compliance with the provisions of the waste disposal guidelines lies with staff authorized to make decisions regarding spatial, financial and/or human resources.
tr_llm: Responsible for implementing the requirements of the waste disposal directive are individuals with authority over spatial, financial and/or personnel resources.
tr_llm_glsr: Individuals with authority regarding spatial, financial and/or personnel resources are responsible for the Transfer of the Criteria of the Waste Disposal Guidelines.

de_text: Dies sind die geschäftsführenden Direktoren und Dezernenten für die instituts- bzw. dezernatsbezogene Organisation sowie Professoren, Werkstattleiter, Abteilungsleiter, Leiter von zentralen Einrichtungen für die Organisation innerhalb des Verantwortungsbereiches.
en_grtr: These will be the executive and division directors for organizational matters within individual institutes, departments or divisions as well as professors, workshop leaders, section heads and unit heads for organizational matters within their sphere of responsibility.
tr_llm: These are the executive directors and division heads for institute- or department-related organization, as well as professors, workshop managers, department heads, and heads of central facilities for the organization within the area of responsibility.
tr_llm_glsr: These are the executive directors and division heads responsible for institute‑ or division‑related organization, as well as professors, workshop managers, department heads, and heads of central facilities for the organization within the area of responsibility.

de_text: Im weiteren Verlauf werden die beschriebenen Personen „Verantwortliche“ genannt.
en_grtr: These individuals will be referred to as “responsible persons” in the rest of this document.
tr_llm: Later, the described individuals are referred to as “responsible parties.”
tr_llm_glsr: In the subsequent sections, the individuals described will be referred to as “responsible parties.”

de_text: Für die praktische Durchführung in den einzelnen Arbeitsbereichen hat der Verantwortliche die organisatorischen Voraussetzungen zu schaffen.
en_grtr: The responsible person is required to ensure that the necessary organizational measures are in place to enable practical implementation in the individual areas of work.
tr_llm: For the practical implementation in the individual work areas, the person responsible must establish the organizational prerequisites.
tr_llm_glsr: For the practical implementation of The PDR itself in the individual work areas, the responsible person must create the organizational conditions; this requires the responsible party to establish the necessary organizational framework.

de_text: Sachkundige Mitarbeiter können bei begleitender und regelmäßiger Unterweisung, unbeschadet der Verantwortung des Verantwortlichen, mit der Durchführung der Entsorgung beauftragt werden.
en_grtr: Provided that they are given support and regular instruction, competent employees may be tasked with disposing of waste, without this releasing the responsible person from their responsibilities.
tr_llm: Qualified employees may, with accompanying and regular training, without prejudice to the responsibility of the person in charge, be tasked with carrying out the disposal.
tr_llm_glsr: Knowledgeable employees can, with accompanying and regular Briefing and without prejudice to the responsibility of the responsible party, be tasked with the PDR itself.

de_text: Diese Mitarbeiter sind auch zur Unterschrift auf den internen Entsorgungsbelegen sowie Leistungsnachweisen und Übernahmescheinen von beauftragten Dritten berechtigt, da sie im Auftrag des Verantwortlichen handeln.
en_grtr: These employees are also authorized to sign internal waste disposal documents as well as confirmations of performance and acceptance certificates from commissioned third parties since they will be acting on behalf of the responsible person.
tr_llm: These employees are also authorized to sign the internal disposal documents as well as performance records and acceptance certificates from commissioned third parties, as they act on behalf of the responsible party.
tr_llm_glsr: These employees are also authorized to provide a Signature on the internal disposal documents as well as on course assessments and transfer certificates from commissioned third parties, because they act on the commission of the responsible party.

de_text: Alle Beschäftigten sowie Auszubildende, Praktikant*innen, wissenschaftliche und studentische Hilfskräfte, Studierende, Gastwissenschaftler*innen und Stipendiat*innen sind vor Aufnahme der Tätigkeiten und anschließend in regelmäßigen Abständen, d.h. mindestens einmal jährlich, arbeitsplatz- bzw. tätigkeitsbezogen zu unterweisen.
en_grtr: All members of staff as well as apprentices, interns, research and student assistants, students, guest researchers and scholarship holders must be briefed on their workplace and duties before commencing these duties and at regular intervals thereafter, i.e. at least once a year.
tr_llm: All employees, as well as trainees, interns, scientific and student assistants, students, guest researchers, and scholarship holders, must receive job- or task-specific instruction before starting their duties and thereafter at regular intervals, i.e., at least once a year.
tr_llm_glsr: All employees, as well as Apprentices, interns, scientific and student assistants, students, guest-researchers and scholarship-recipients, must be instructed on workplace- or task-related matters before starting their work and subsequently at regular intervals, i.e., at least every year.

de_text: Diese Unterweisung umfasst neben den jeweils geltenden Sicherheitsaspekten auch die ordnungsgemäße Entsorgung der Abfälle, die im Arbeitsbereich entstehen.
en_grtr: As well as the applicable safety aspects, this briefing must also cover the correct disposal of the waste generated within their area of work.
tr_llm: This instruction includes, in addition to the applicable safety aspects, the proper disposal of waste generated in the work area.
tr_llm_glsr: This briefing includes, alongside the applicable safety aspects, the proper disposal of waste generated in the Where do you work?.

de_text: Hilfestellung zum Thema Unterweisung bietet die Stabsstelle Arbeits- und Umweltschutz an.
en_grtr: The Occupational Safety and Environmental Protection Unit can help with this briefing.
tr_llm: Assistance on the topic of training is offered by the staff unit for occupational health and environmental protection.
tr_llm_glsr: The Occupational Safety and Environmental Protection Unit can help with this briefing.

de_text: Verlassen Professoren, Angestellte oder Studierende ihren bisherigen experimentellen Arbeitsplatz (z. B. Emeritierung, Beendigung des Beschäftigungsverhältnisses, des Studiums oder der wissenschaftlichen Arbeit) ist durch die jeweilige verantwortliche Person eine ordnungsgemäße Übergabe des Arbeitsplatzes sicherzustellen.
en_grtr: If professors, employees or students no longer require their workstation in an experimental laboratory (e.g. because they are taking up an emeritus position or reaching the end of their employment relationship, degree program or research project), the person responsible in each case must make sure that their workstation is handed over properly.
tr_llm: When professors, staff or students leave their current experimental workplace (e.g., retirement, termination of employment, completion of studies or scientific work), the responsible person must ensure an orderly handover of the workplace.
tr_llm_glsr: When professors, staff or students leave their current experimental workplace (e.g., retirement, termination of employment, completion of studies or research), the responsible person must ensure a proper handover of the workplace.

de_text: Die Organisation dieser verpflichtenden Übergabe obliegt der jeweiligen verantwortlichen Person.
en_grtr: The person responsible in each case is required to organize this mandatory task.
tr_llm: The organization of this mandatory handover is the responsibility of the respective person in charge.
tr_llm_glsr: The organization of this mandatory handover is the responsibility of the respective responsible person.

de_text: Der Abfallerzeuger hat bis zur Entsorgung sicherzustellen, dass von den Abfällen, den Behältern oder deren Inhalt keinerlei Gefahr für Personen oder die Umwelt ausgehen kann.
en_grtr: The waste producer must ensure that neither the waste itself nor its containers or their contents can pose any risk whatsoever to people or the environment right up until the waste is disposed of.
tr_llm: The waste producer must ensure, up to disposal, that the waste, the containers, or their contents pose no danger to persons or the environment.
tr_llm_glsr: The waste producer must ensure, until disposal, that the waste, the containers, or their contents pose no danger to people or the environment.

de_text: Auflagen im Bereich des Brandschutzes müssen unbedingt beachtet werden.
en_grtr: Fire protection regulations must always be complied with.
tr_llm: Fire safety requirements must be strictly observed.
tr_llm_glsr: Fire protection regulations must always be complied with.

de_text: Treppen, Flure, Verkehrswege und Ausgänge müssen stets freigehalten werden und dürfen, auch nicht kurzfristig, zugestellt werden.
en_grtr: Stairwells, corridors, traffic routes and exits must always be kept clear and must not be closed off even briefly.

tr_llm_glsr: Stairs, corridors, passageways and exits must always be kept clear and must not be blocked, even on short notice.

de_text: Es darf dort kein brennbares Material gelagert werden.

tr_llm_glsr: No flammable materials may be stored there.

de_text: Das Verbot einer nicht genehmigten Lagerung erstreckt sich ebenfalls über Abfälle mit anderen Gefahreneigenschaften, wie z. B. ätzenden oder giftigen Merkmalen.
en_grtr: The ban on unauthorized storage also covers waste that is hazardous for other reasons, e.g. due to its corrosive, poisonous or toxic properties.
tr_llm: The prohibition of unauthorized storage also extends to waste with other hazardous properties, such as corrosive or toxic characteristics.
tr_llm_glsr: The prohibition of unauthorized storage also applies regarding waste with other hazardous properties, such as corrosive or toxic characteristics.

de_text: Des Weiteren begünstigt das ungesicherte, vorzeitige Herausstellen des Abfalls das sogenannte Plündern bzw. Verstreuen des Abfalls, das wiederum zu einer Gefährdung und zusätzlichem Mehraufwand führen kann.
en_grtr: In addition, putting waste out for collection too early and without securing it first makes it more likely to be stolen or strewn around, which can pose a hazard and result in extra work and/or costs.
tr_llm: Furthermore, the unsecured, premature removal of the waste encourages the so-called scavenging or scattering of the waste, which in turn can lead to a hazard and additional effort.
tr_llm_glsr: Furthermore, unsecured, premature removal of waste encourages the so‑called scavenging or scattering of the waste, which can in turn lead to hazards and additional effort.

de_text: Im Gefahrgut- und Abfallrecht bestehen Vorgaben, die es erforderlich machen, die Inhaltsstoffe der Abfallgemische genauer zu beschreiben bzw. verbindlich festzulegen.
en_grtr: Hazardous materials and waste law contains provisions requiring the substances contained in mixtures of wastes to be described in more detail and specified with binding effect.
tr_llm: In hazardous materials and waste law, there are provisions that require the components of waste mixtures to be described more precisely or to be definitively specified.
tr_llm_glsr: In dangerous‑goods and waste law, there are criteria that require the components of waste mixtures to be described more precisely or to be definitively specified.

de_text: Um diese Abfälle gemäß der gefahrgut- und abfallrechtlichen Vorgaben einstufen zu können, benötigt das Sachgebiet Entsorgung detaillierte Informationen über die Abfallzusammensetzung.
en_grtr: The Waste Management and Hazardous Materials Unit needs detailed information on the composition of this waste in order to classify it in accordance with these provisions.
tr_llm: To classify these wastes according to hazardous material and waste regulations, the disposal department requires detailed information on the waste composition.
tr_llm_glsr: In order to classify this waste according to the hazardous goods and waste regulations criteria, the Disposal Unit requires detailed information regarding the waste composition.

de_text: Diese Einstufung muss vorliegen und ist für neue Arbeitskreise vor der erstmaligen Entsorgung einzureichen.
en_grtr: This classification must have been done and must be submitted for new working groups before they dispose of any waste.
tr_llm: This classification must be in place and must be submitted for new work groups before the first disposal.
tr_llm_glsr: The classification must be in place and submitted for new working groups prior to the initial disposal.

de_text: Die darauffolgende Einstufung ist bis auf Widerruf verbindlich.
en_grtr: The classification below will remain in force until revoked.
tr_llm: The subsequent classification is binding until revoked.
tr_llm_glsr: The classification below will remain in force until revoked.

de_text: Ohne Vorlage dieses Formulars kann keine Entsorgung von Abfällen stattfinden.
