tr_llm: Our professional drivers operate our buses, trucks and cars for you, whether it involves excursions, passenger and/or small‑goods transport.
tr_llm_glsr: Our professional drivers are driving for you with our buses, trucks and automobiles, whether it involves excursions, passenger or small‑material transport.

de_text: Wir stehen Ihnen bei allen Fragen und Abwicklungen rund um Ihre dienstlichen Fahrzeuge zur Verfügung.
en_grtr: If you have any questions or need anything doing regarding your cars for official use, we’re happy to help.
tr_llm: We are at your disposal for any questions and matters concerning your official vehicles.
tr_llm_glsr: We are at your disposal for any questions and matters concerning your company vehicles.

de_text: Sie dürfen externe Personen nur befördern, wenn der Haftungsausschluss unterschrieben wurde.
en_grtr: You may only carry non-University passengers if the relevant disclaimer has been signed.
tr_llm: You may only transport external persons if the liability waiver has been signed.
tr_llm_glsr: You may only transport external persons if the disclaimer has been signed.

de_text: An den Schlüsseln befinden sich RFI Chips, welche Sie an den Ladesäulen der Uni benutzen können.
en_grtr: The keys come with RFID cards that you can use at the University’s charging stations.
tr_llm: The keys contain RFI chips that you can use at the university’s charging stations.
tr_llm_glsr: The keys contain RFI chips that you can use at the university’s charging stations.

de_text: Sie haben in der Zeit von Montag-Freitag von 7:30-15:30 Zeit das reservierte Fahrzeug abzuholen.
en_grtr: If you’ve reserved a vehicle, you can pick it up any time between 7:30 am and 3:30 pm Monday to Friday.
tr_llm: You have time to pick up the reserved vehicle between Monday and Friday from 7:30 a.m. to 3:30 p.m.
tr_llm_glsr: You can pick up the reserved vehicle Monday‑Friday from 7:30 am to 3:30 pm.

de_text: Füllen Sie bitte die Kraftfahrzeugrichtlinien und den Antrag auf Dienstführerschein aus.
en_grtr: Please fill in the motor vehicle guidelines and a request for a license to drive University vehicles.
tr_llm: Please fill out the motor vehicle regulations and the application for a service driver's license.
tr_llm_glsr: Please complete the motor vehicle guidelines and the request for a service driver's license.

de_text: Diese beiden Formulare müssen Sie mit Ihrem Führerschein bei Frau Lemmen (Abt. 4.1) einreichen/vorzeigen.
en_grtr: You will need to send/show these two forms and your driver’s license to Petra Lemmen (Section 4.1).
tr_llm: You must submit or present these two forms together with your driver’s license to Ms. Lemmen (Dept. 4.1).
tr_llm_glsr: You must submit these two Forms together with your drivers-license to Ms. Lemmen (Dept. 4.1).

de_text: So können Sie das Fahrzeug bei uns auf den Hof stellen.
en_grtr: allowing you to leave your vehicle in our yard.
tr_llm: This way you can place the vehicle on our yard.
tr_llm_glsr: This allows you to leave your vehicle in our yard.

de_text: Bitte schließen Sie danach das Tor ab, reinigen Sie das Fahrzeug und werfen Sie Mappe und Schlüssel in den Briefkasten.
en_grtr: Please close the gate behind you, clean the vehicle and post the folder and keys into the mailbox.
tr_llm: Please lock the gate afterwards, clean the vehicle and throw the folder and key into the mailbox.
tr_llm_glsr: Please lock the gate afterwards, clean the vehicle, and drop the folder and keys into the mailbox.

de_text: Dann können Sie den Hof rechts durch die Tür verlassen.
en_grtr: Then you can exit the yard through the door on the right.
tr_llm: Then you can leave the yard on the right through the door.
tr_llm_glsr: Then you can exit the yard through the door on the right.

de_text: Dieser wird dann entsprechend Montags oder Dienstags durchgeführt.
en_grtr: which will be transported on the coming Monday or Tuesday.
tr_llm: It will then be carried out on Monday or Tuesday accordingly.
tr_llm_glsr: which will be transported on the coming Monday or Tuesday.

de_text: Wir kümmern uns um Reparaturen, Wartungen, TÜV, Räder-/Reifenwechsel, Steuerung der externen Werkstatttermine inklusive Abwicklung im SRM.
en_grtr: We’ll take care of repairs, services, TÜV roadworthiness tests, wheel/tire changes and managing appointments at non-University garages, including processing in SRM.
tr_llm: We handle repairs, maintenance, TÜV inspections, wheel/tyre changes, and the coordination of external workshop appointments, including processing in the SRM.
tr_llm_glsr: We take care of repairs, maintenance, TÜV, wheel/tyre changes, management of external workshop appointments, including Processing in the SRM.

de_text: Bitte melden Sie sich zeitnah wenn Ihnen etwas an ihrem Fahrzeug auffällt und/oder der Service im Fahrzeug angezeigt wird.
en_grtr: Please let us know promptly if you notice anything unusual about your vehicle or it is telling you that a service is due.
tr_llm: Please report promptly if you notice anything about your vehicle and/or if a service message appears in the vehicle.
tr_llm_glsr: Please let us know promptly if you notice anything about your vehicle or if a service warning is displayed.

de_text: Bitte stellen Sie uns für die Abrechnung der anfallenden Kosten in SRM Ihr PSP-Element zur Verfügung.
en_grtr: You will need to provide us with your WBS element so that we can bill the costs incurred in SRM.
tr_llm: Please provide us with your PSP element for billing the incurred costs in SRM.
tr_llm_glsr: Please provide us with your WBS element for billing the incurred Costs in SRM.

de_text: Bitte melden Sie sich bei uns telefonisch oder kommen Sie wenn möglich vorbei.
en_grtr: Please call us or, if possible, pop by in person.
tr_llm: Please contact us by phone or, if possible, stop by.
tr_llm_glsr: Please contact us by phone or, if Potential, stop by.

de_text: So können wir den Umfang einschätzen und zusammen die Instandsetzung planen.
en_grtr: This will allow us to gauge the amount of work to be done and plan the repairs together with you.
tr_llm: This way we can assess the scope and plan the repair together.
tr_llm_glsr: That way we can assess the scope and plan the repair together.

de_text: Wenn Sie etwas Spezielles benötigen, brauchen wir für die Bestellung den Fahrzeugschein und für die Abrechnung in SRM das passende PSP-Element.
en_grtr: If you require something specific, we will need the vehicle’s registration document (Fahrzeugschein) to order it in and the corresponding WBS element to bill the costs in SRM.
tr_llm: If you need something special, we need the vehicle registration certificate for the order and the appropriate PSP element for billing in SRM.
tr_llm_glsr: If you need something special, we need the vehicle registration certificate for the purchase-order and the appropriate WBS element for billing in SRM.

de_text: Tankkarten mit der Kennzeichnung RC 90 haben einen DKV Assist.
en_grtr: Fuel cards marked “RC 90” come with DKV ASSIST roadside assistance membership.
tr_llm: Fuel cards marked RC 90 have a DKV Assist.
tr_llm_glsr: Fuel cards marked “RC 90” come with DKV ASSIST roadside assistance membership.

de_text: Wenn Ihr Fahrzeug unterwegs (außerhalb des Einzugsgebiets) eine Panne hat und Sie es nicht mehr aus eigener Kraft in eine Werkstatt schaffen, dann ist guter Rat gar nicht teuer!
en_grtr: If your vehicle breaks down on the road (outside the catchment area) and you can’t get it to a garage yourself, there’s no need to panic.
tr_llm: If your vehicle breaks down while on the road (outside the coverage area) and you can’t get it to a workshop on your own, good advice isn’t expensive at all.
tr_llm_glsr: If your vehicle breaks down while you’re out of the service area and you can’t get it to a workshop on your own, good advice doesn’t cost much.

de_text: Bei uns haben Sie die Möglichkeit alle Fahrzeuge der Uni auf unserem Waschplatz zu reinigen.
en_grtr: You’re welcome to use our washing station to clean any University vehicle.
tr_llm: With us you have the opportunity to clean all university vehicles at our wash station.
tr_llm_glsr: With us you can clean all university vehicles at our wash station.

de_text: Bitte Verschmutzungen am und im Fahrzeug so gering wie möglich halten und den Müll aus dem Fahrzeug entsorgen.
en_grtr: Please try and keep vehicles as clean as possible inside and out and remove any rubbish.
tr_llm: Please keep dirt on and in the vehicle to a minimum and dispose of the trash from the vehicle.
tr_llm_glsr: Please keep any dirt on and inside the vehicle to a minimum and dispose of the trash from the vehicle.

de_text: Falls sich das nicht vermeiden lässt, ist das Fahrzeug vor dem Abstellen zu reinigen!
en_grtr: If a bit of dirt is unavoidable, make sure that you clean the vehicle before returning it.
tr_llm: If this cannot be avoided, the vehicle must be cleaned before parking!
tr_llm_glsr: If this cannot be avoided, the vehicle must be cleaned before being parked.

de_text: Infolge hoher Auslastung der Fahrzeuge ist eine Reinigung durch den Fahrdienst oft nicht möglich, wenn die Fahrzeuge direkt am nächsten Tag von einem anderen Institut/Nutzer genutzt werden.
en_grtr: Because the vehicles are frequently booked up, Transport Services is often unable to clean them if they are needed the very next day by another department/institute/user.
tr_llm: Because the vehicles are heavily utilized, cleaning by the transport service is often not possible when the vehicles are used directly the next day by another institute or user.
tr_llm_glsr: Due to the high utilization of the vehicles, Cleaning by the Transport Services is often not possible when the vehicles are used directly the next day by another Institute or user.

de_text: Haltet bitte daher die Fahrzeuge für euch und andere möglichst sauber!
en_grtr: So please keep vehicles as clean as possible, both for yourself and for other users.
tr_llm: Please therefore keep the vehicles as clean as possible for yourselves and others!
tr_llm_glsr: Therefore, please keep the vehicles as clean as possible for you and others.

de_text: Für Fahrten welche auf Felder oder ähnliches gehen, stehen Sitzschoner und Fußschoner bereit, welche zu nutzen sind um auch den Innenraum sauber zu halten.
en_grtr: Seat covers and floor mats are available for off-road trips, which we would ask you to use in order to keep your vehicle’s interior clean too.
tr_llm: For trips that go onto fields or similar terrain, seat protectors and foot protectors are provided, to be used to keep the interior clean.
tr_llm_glsr: For trips that go onto fields or anything similar, seat protectors and foot protectors are provided and should be used to keep the interior clean.

de_text: Die Fahrzeuge werden nach der Benutzung bitte getankt zurückgegeben.
en_grtr: Please return vehicles with a full tank after use.
tr_llm: Please return the vehicles refueled after use.
tr_llm_glsr: Please return vehicles with a full tank after use.

de_text: Da sowohl im Profil als auch in diesen digitalen Formularen automatisiert die „uni-bonn.de“-Adresse Ihrer Uni-ID verwendet wird, überprüfen Sie bitte auf https://gosa.gosa.uni-bonn.de —> E-Mail —> Weiterleitung, ob dort bereits Ihre Verwaltungs-E-Mail-Adresse eingetragen ist.
en_grtr: As the “uni-bonn.de” address of your Uni-ID is used in both your profile and these digital forms, please check whether your administration email has already been entered there. To do so, go to https://gosa.gosa.uni-bonn.de —> E-Mail (Mail) —> Weiterleitung (Forwarding).
tr_llm: Since the “uni-bonn.de” address of your university ID is automatically used both in your profile and in these digital forms, please check on https://gosa.gosa.uni-bonn.de → Email → Forwarding whether your administrative email address is already entered there.
tr_llm_glsr: Since the “uni‑bonn.de” address of your university ID is automatically used both in your profile and in these digital forms, please check on https://gosa.gosa.uni-bonn.de → Email → Forwarding whether your administrative Email address is already entered there.

de_text: am 11. Dezember 2023 geht das Serviceportal der Universität Bonn online und ersetzt das bisherige Intranet.
en_grtr: The University of Bonn’s Service Portal goes live on December 11, 2023, replacing the current intranet.
tr_llm: On December 11, 2023, the service portal of the University of Bonn will go online and replace the existing intranet.
tr_llm_glsr: On December 11, 2023, the Service Portal at the University of Bonn will go live and replace the existing intranet.

de_text: Um das Serviceportal nutzen und dessen Inhalte sehen zu können, möchten wir Ihnen einige Nutzungsinformationen mit an die Hand geben.
en_grtr: We would like to give you some information that will enable you to use the portal and view its content.
tr_llm: To use the service portal and view its content, we would like to provide you with some usage information.
tr_llm_glsr: To use the Service Portal and view its Content, we would like to provide you with some usage information.

de_text: Für die Anmeldung auf Confluence ist die Nutzung Ihrer Uni-ID ist aus Sicherheits- und Datenschutzgründen notwendig.
en_grtr: and you will need to use your Uni-ID in order to log into it for security and data protection reasons.
tr_llm: Using your university ID is necessary for security and data protection reasons when logging in to Confluence.
tr_llm_glsr: For registration on Confluence, the use of your university ID is necessary for security and data protection reasons.

de_text: Auf Confluence wird nach dem einmaligen Einloggen mit Ihrer Uni-ID (wie Sie es bereits aus anderen Bereichen wie SAP oder Sciebo gewohnt sind) automatisch ein Profil von Ihnen hinterlegt, in dem Ihr Name sowie Ihre uni-bonn.de-Adresse erscheint.
en_grtr: Once you have logged into Confluence for the first time using your Uni-ID (in the same way as you will already have done for e.g. SAP or Sciebo), a profile will be set up there for you that will display your name and your uni-bonn.de address.
tr_llm: On Confluence, after the one-time login with your university ID (as you are already accustomed to from other services like SAP or Sciebo), a profile of you is automatically created, showing your name and your uni‑bonn.de address.
tr_llm_glsr: On Confluence, after the one‑time login with your university ID (as you’re already used to from other services like SAP or Sciebo), a profile is automatically created for you that includes your name and your uni‑bonn.de address.

de_text: Wir möchten Sie darum bitten, dieses Profil mit weiteren Angaben wie beispielsweise der dienstlichen Telefonnummer und mit Organisationsangaben zu ergänzen und ab sofort dauerhaft aktuell zu halten.
en_grtr: Please add more information to your profile such as your work phone number and organizational details and make sure that you always keep it up to date from that point on.
tr_llm: We would like to ask you to supplement this profile with additional information such as the official phone number and organizational details, and to keep it permanently up to date from now on.
tr_llm_glsr: We kindly ask you to add further details to this profile, such as the work Phone number and organizational information, and to keep it permanently up to date from now on.

de_text: Eine Anleitung ist diesem Schreiben als Anlage beigefügt.
en_grtr: You will find some instructions enclosed with this circular.
tr_llm: A guide is attached to this letter as an enclosure.
tr_llm_glsr: You will find some instructions enclosed with this circular.

de_text: Diese Angaben sind ausschließlich für Universitätsmitarbeiter*innen sichtbar, nicht aber für Außenstehende oder Studierende.
en_grtr: The information in your profile is only visible to other University colleagues, not to students or anyone from outside.
tr_llm: These details are visible only to university staff, not to outsiders or students.
tr_llm_glsr: These details are visible only to university staff, not to outsiders or students.

de_text: Sie dienen dem schnellen, dienstlichen Austausch und können automatisiert als Visitenkarte auf diversen internen Seiten übernommen werden.
en_grtr: It allows staff to discuss work matters quickly and easily and can be converted into a business card by automated means for use on various internal pages.
tr_llm: They facilitate fast, official exchange and can be automatically incorporated as a business card on various internal pages.
tr_llm_glsr: They enable quick, official exchange and can be automatically adopted as a business card on various internal pages.

de_text: Das Serviceportal wird den Arbeitsalltag an der Universität Bonn erleichtern und ein Aspekt dieser Arbeitserleichterung beinhaltet, dass auf dem Portal vorgefertigte Formulare bereitstehen, die Sie direkt im Portal und somit auf Confluence ausfüllen können.
en_grtr: The Service Portal will make day-to-day work at the University of Bonn easier, not least because it contains ready-made forms that you can complete in the portal itself and thus on Confluence.
tr_llm: The service portal will make everyday work at the University of Bonn easier, and one aspect of this facilitation is that pre-made forms are available on the portal, which you can fill out directly in the portal and thus on Confluence.
tr_llm_glsr: The Service Portal will streamline everyday work at the University of Bonn, and one element of this improvement is that the portal offers pre‑prepared Forms that you can fill out directly in the portal, and therefore on Confluence.

de_text: Nur so kann garantiert werden, dass Sie zukünftig weiterhin alle E-Mails und Informationen zu von Ihnen ausgefüllten Formularen in Ihrem Verwaltungspostfach erhalten.
en_grtr: This is the only way to ensure that all emails and information about forms that you have filled in will continue to be sent to your administration inbox in future.
tr_llm: Only this way can it be guaranteed that you will continue to receive all emails and information about the forms you have completed in your administrative mailbox in the future.
tr_llm_glsr: Only this way can it be guaranteed that you will continue to receive all emails and information about the forms you have completed in your administrative mailbox in the future.

de_text: Ändern Sie aus Sicherheitsgründen das Passwort Ihrer Uni-ID regelmäßig, beachten Sie dabei bekannte Passwortstandards und geben Sie das Passwort und die Uni-ID nicht weiter.
en_grtr: For security reasons, you should change the password for your Uni-ID regularly—observing the now-familiar password standards—and do not tell anyone else your password or Uni-ID.
tr_llm: For security reasons, regularly change the password of your university ID, follow established password standards, and do not share the password or the university ID.
tr_llm_glsr: Modify the existing password of your university ID regularly for security reasons, observe established password standards, and do not share the password or the university ID.

de_text: Sollten Sie Fragen haben, steht Ihnen das Projektteam gerne zur Verfügung.
en_grtr: Please do not hesitate to contact the project team if you have any questions.
tr_llm: If you have any questions, the project team is at your disposal.
tr_llm_glsr: If you have any questions, the project team is happy to assist you.

de_text: Wir wünschen viel Spaß beim Suchen, Finden und Erledigen!
en_grtr: We hope you enjoy finding answers quickly so you can focus on key tasks.
tr_llm: We wish you lots of fun searching, finding, and completing!
tr_llm_glsr: We hope you have a lot of fun searching, finding, and getting things done!

de_text: zum Ende des Jahres 2023 wird das Intranet der Universität Bonn abgeschaltet, da das zugrunde liegende Web-Content-Management-System (CMS) Plone 3 vollständig eingestellt wird (siehe Rundschreiben 01/2023).
en_grtr: The University of Bonn intranet will be switched off at the end of 2023 because the web content management system (CMS) on which it runs, Plone 3, is being discontinued (see Circular 01/2023).
tr_llm: By the end of 2023, the University of Bonn’s intranet will be shut down, as the underlying web content management system (CMS) Plone 3 is being completely discontinued (see circular 01/2023).
tr_llm_glsr: At the end of 2023, the intranet at the University of Bonn will be shut down because the underlying web content management system (CMS) Plone 3 is being completely discontinued (see Circular 01/2023).

de_text: Heute möchten wir Sie darüber informieren, dass am 11. Dezember 2023 das neue Serviceportal der Universität Bonn online geht und das bisherige Intranet ersetzt.
en_grtr: The purpose of today’s circular is to let you know that the University’s new Service Portal is going live on December 11, 2023, replacing the current intranet.
tr_llm: Today we would like to inform you that on December 11, 2023 the new service portal of the University of Bonn will go online and replace the existing intranet.
tr_llm_glsr: Today we would like to inform you that on December 11, 2023 the new Service Portal at the University of Bonn will go live and will replace the existing intranet.

de_text: Das Serviceportal wird in der Wissensmanagement-Software Confluence realisiert.
en_grtr: The Service Portal has been created using the knowledge management software Confluence.
tr_llm: The service portal is implemented in the knowledge management software Confluence.
tr_llm_glsr: The Service Portal has been created using the knowledge management software Confluence.

de_text: Nutzen Sie dazu bitte Ihre Uni-ID und das dazugehörige Passwort.
en_grtr: using their Uni-ID and associated password.
tr_llm: Please use your university ID and the associated password for this.
tr_llm_glsr: Please do so using your Uni-ID and the associated password.

de_text: Das Projekt ‚Serviceportal‘ startete Anfang dieses Jahres mit dem Ziel, Informationen und Angebote der Universitätsverwaltung themenorientiert an einem Ort zu bündeln und deren Auffindbarkeit zu erleichtern.
en_grtr: The “Service Portal” project was launched at the start of the year in order to pool information and services provided by Central Administration in one place, arranged by topic, and make everything easier to find.
tr_llm: The “Service Portal” project started at the beginning of this year with the goal of consolidating information and services of the university administration thematically in one place and making them easier to find.
tr_llm_glsr: The Service Portal project started at the beginning of this year with the objective of consolidating the university administration's information and what is on offer in a topic‑oriented single location and facilitating their Findability.

de_text: Während der Umsetzung des Projektes wurden Services optimiert und digitalisiert, beispielsweise mit der Hilfe von Online-Formularen.
en_grtr: The project has also involved optimizing services and making them digital, e.g. with the help of online forms.
tr_llm: During the implementation of the project, services were optimized and digitized, for example with the help of online forms.
tr_llm_glsr: During the transfer of the project, services were optimized and digitized, for example with the help of online forms.

de_text: Dieser Optimierungs- und Digitalisierungsprozess ist noch nicht abgeschlossen und wird laufend fortgeführt.
en_grtr: This optimization and digitalization process is not yet complete and is continuing to be implemented.
tr_llm: This optimization and digitization process is not yet completed and is being continuously continued.
tr_llm_glsr: This optimization and digitization process is not yet complete and is being continuously carried out.

de_text: Bei dem Serviceportal handelt es sich um ein lebendes Portal, welches sukzessive und kontinuierlich weiterentwickelt wird.
en_grtr: The Service Portal is a “living” platform that is being gradually enhanced on an ongoing basis.
tr_llm: The service portal is a living portal that is being continuously and progressively further developed.
tr_llm_glsr: The Service Portal is a living portal that is being continuously and progressively further developed.

de_text: Aktuell liegt beispielsweise ein Fokus auf dem Ausbau der englischsprachigen Version des Serviceportals.
en_grtr: One of the current areas of focus, for example, is expanding its English-language version.
tr_llm: Currently, for example, the focus is on expanding the English-language version of the service portal.
tr_llm_glsr: Currently, for example, the focus is on expanding the English-language version of the service portal.

de_text: Um den Übergang hin zu vollständig digitalen Prozessen so effizient wie möglich für Sie zu gestalten, können aber ab sofort sämtliche über das Serviceportal verfügbaren Anträge und Formulare im PDF-Format per E-Mail und ohne Unterschrift zur Bearbeitung an die Antragsbearbeiter*innen in der Verwaltung versendet werden.
en_grtr: In order to make the switch to fully digital processes as efficient as possible for you, however, all requests and forms available on the Service Portal can now be emailed as PDFs to the relevant administrative staff for processing without needing to be signed.
tr_llm: To make the transition to fully digital processes as efficient as possible for you, all applications and forms available through the service portal can now be sent in PDF format by e‑mail, without a signature, to the application processors in the administration for processing.
tr_llm_glsr: To make the transition to fully digital processes as efficient as the potential allows for you, you can now send all applications and Forms available via the Service Portal in PDF format by Email and without Signature to the application processors in the administration for the process.

de_text: Sie müssen hierzu lediglich die Genehmigungen der Zeichnungsberechtigten per E-Mail einholen und den entsprechenden Verlauf an die bearbeitende Stelle senden.
en_grtr: All you need to do is obtain approval from the authorized signatories by email and send the relevant workflow to the office or person responsible for processing it.
tr_llm: You only need to obtain the approvals of the authorized signatories by e‑mail and send the corresponding record to the processing office.
tr_llm_glsr: You only need to obtain the approvals from the authorized signatories via Email and forward the relevant record to the processing department.

de_text: Mit dem Go-live bildet das Serviceportal noch nicht alle Inhalte vollumfänglich ab.
en_grtr: The Service Portal will not yet include all content in full when it goes live.
tr_llm: At go-live, the service portal does not yet fully represent all content.
tr_llm_glsr: At go-live, the Service Portal does not yet fully represent all content.

de_text: Sollten Sie auf Probleme und Unstimmigkeiten stoßen, bitten wir Sie sehr herzlich um Anregungen und Feedback, welches das Projektteam jederzeit gerne annimmt.
en_grtr: Should you encounter any problems or spot anything that does not look quite right, the project team would be delighted to hear your suggestions and feedback at any time.
tr_llm: If you encounter any problems or inconsistencies, we warmly request your suggestions and feedback, which the project team is always happy to receive.
tr_llm_glsr: If you encounter any problems or inconsistencies, we would greatly appreciate your suggestions and feedback, which the project team is always happy to accept.

de_text:
Sehr geehrte Damen und Herren, liebe Kolleg*innen,
 
am 11. Dezember 2023 geht das Serviceportal der Universität Bonn online und ersetzt das bisherige Intranet (www.uni-bonn.de/serviceportal).
en_grtr:
Dear Sir or Madam, dear colleagues,
 
The University of Bonn’s Service Portal (www.uni-bonn.de/serviceportal) goes live on December 11, 2023, replacing the current intranet.
tr_llm:
Dear Sir or Madam, dear colleagues,

On December 11, 2023, the University of Bonn's service portal will go online and replace the existing intranet (www.uni-bonn.de/serviceportal).
tr_llm_glsr:
Dear Sir or Madam, dear colleagues,

On December 11, 2023, the Service Portal at the University of Bonn will go live and replace the existing intranet (www.uni-bonn.de/serviceportal).

de_text: Um das Serviceportal für Sie und die anderen Nutzer*innen so gewinnbringend wie möglich zu gestalten, bitte ich Sie ab sofort folgende Informationen und Hinweise zum künftigen Freigabeprozess von Anträgen und Formularen zu beachten.
en_grtr: To make the new portal as beneficial as possible for you and your fellow users, I would be grateful if, from now on, you could bear in mind the following information and instructions regarding the process for approving requests and forms in the future.
tr_llm: To make the service portal as beneficial as possible for you and the other users, I ask you to from now on take note of the following information and guidelines regarding the upcoming approval process for applications and forms.
tr_llm_glsr: To make the Service Portal as beneficial as its Potential for you and other users, I ask you to, effective immediately, heed the following information and N.B. concerning the upcoming release process for applications and forms.

de_text: Mit Go-live ermöglichen wir den Nutzer*innen, sämtliche über das Serviceportal verfügbaren Anträge und Formulare im PDF-Format, ohne Unterschrift, per E-Mail zu versenden (so wie wir es bereits während der Pandemiephase erfolgreich praktiziert haben).
en_grtr: When the Service Portal goes live, users will be able to submit all requests and forms available on it by email as PDFs without needing them to be signed (as we did successfully during the pandemic).
tr_llm: With go-live we enable users to send all applications and forms available through the service portal in PDF format, without a signature, via email (as we have already successfully practiced during the pandemic phase).
tr_llm_glsr: With go-live we enable users to send all applications and Forms available via the Service Portal in PDF format, without Signature, by Email (as we already successfully practiced during the pandemic phase).

de_text: Die Anträge müssen von den Antragssteller*innen und Zeichnungsberechtigten direkt per E-Mail-Verlauf freigegeben werden.
en_grtr: Requests will need to be approved by the individuals submitting them and by the authorized signatories directly via the email workflow.
tr_llm: The applications must be approved directly by the applicants and authorized signatories via the email thread.
tr_llm_glsr: The applications must be approved directly by the applicants and authorized signatories via the Email thread.

de_text: Die in der E-Mail befindliche einfache elektronische Signatur ist hierfür ausreichend.
en_grtr: The simple electronic signature contained in an email will suffice for this purpose.
tr_llm: The simple electronic signature contained in the email is sufficient for this.
tr_llm_glsr: The simple electronic signature in the Email is sufficient for this.

de_text: Das bedeutet für die Antragsbearbeiter*innen, dass Anträge, die ohne Unterschrift und per E-Mail, inklusive vollständigem Freigabeverlauf, gesendet wurden, bearbeitet werden müssen.
en_grtr: For anyone processing a request, this means that any that have been submitted unsigned by email and whose approval workflow has been completed will need to be actioned.
tr_llm: This means for the application processors that applications sent without a signature and by e‑mail, including the complete approval history, must be processed.
tr_llm_glsr: This means for the application processors that applications sent without a Signature and via Email, including the complete approval trail, must be processed.

de_text: Mit Go-live des Serviceportals ist es wichtig, dass die jeweiligen Kontaktmöglichkeiten, welche im Serviceportal angegeben wurden, erreichbar sind, oder eine Weiterleitung eingerichtet wird, sodass Anfragen möglichst schnell bearbeitet werden können.
en_grtr: When the Service Portal goes live, it is important that the people listed on it as contacts can actually be contacted, or a forwarding arrangement has been set up, so that inquiries can be dealt with as quickly as possible.
tr_llm: With the go-live of the service portal, it is important that the respective contact options listed in the portal are reachable, or that a forwarding is set up so that inquiries can be handled as quickly as possible.
tr_llm_glsr: When the Service Portal goes live, N.B. that the contact options provided in the Service Portal must be reachable, or a forwarding must be arranged, so that inquiries can be handled as quickly as possible.

tr_llm_glsr: If you have any questions, the project team is always available to assist you.

tr_llm_glsr: Regarding the What to do for workplace accidents, the Staff Unit for Occupational and Environmental Protection informs through its occupational, health and environmental-protection management system.

tr_llm_glsr: If you have problems with water, electricity, heating or air‑conditioning, the technical services at the University of Bonn are happy to help.

tr_llm: Further information can be found on the intranet.
tr_llm_glsr: More information can be found on the intranet.

tr_llm_glsr: Some emergencies attract significant public and media interest.

tr_llm: Please contact the CERT or the IT security team of the University of Bonn directly.
tr_llm_glsr: Please contact the CERT or the IT security team at the University of Bonn directly.

tr_llm_glsr: Here you will find all important information and contact details concerning campus safety.

de_text: Bestellungen für Sicherheitsdienstleistungen/Bewachungsdienstleistungen/Schließdienste und Garderobendienste sind ausschließlich per Mail an uns zu richten.
en_grtr: Requests for security, surveillance, locking and checkroom services must be emailed to us.

tr_llm_glsr: Orders for security services, guard services, lock services, and cloakroom services should be sent to us only by email.

de_text: Wir prüfen Ihr Anliegen sorgfältig in Bezug auf Sinnhaftigkeit und Budgetverfügbarkeit und,  und lösen für Sie die zu Ihren Bedürfnissen passende Bestellung bei dem von uns beauftragten Sicherheitsdienstleister aus.
en_grtr: We will review your request carefully to verify whether it is reasonable and within our budget and, if so, will place an order that meets your needs with the security services provider working on our behalf.
tr_llm: We carefully examine your request regarding its relevance and budget availability and place the appropriate order for you with the security service provider we have commissioned.
tr_llm_glsr: We are reviewing documents concerning your request for relevance and budget availability, and we will issue the purchase-order that best matches your needs with the security service provider we have commissioned.

de_text: Sie müssen uns kein PSP Element Mitteilen.
en_grtr: You do not need to provide us with a WBS element.
tr_llm: You do not have to inform us of a PSP element.
tr_llm_glsr: You do not need to provide us with a WBS element.

de_text: Alle Sicherheitsdienstleistungen werden aus zentralen Mitteln beglichen.
en_grtr: All security services are paid for out of central funds.
tr_llm: All security services are paid for from central funds.
tr_llm_glsr: All security services are paid for out of central funds.

de_text: Eine Bestellung über SRM oder über einen "Conject" Auftrag ist nicht möglich und wird nicht bearbeitet.

tr_llm: An order via SRM or via a “Conject” order is not possible and will not be processed.
tr_llm_glsr: A purchase-order regarding SRM or regarding a "Conject" commission has no Potential and will not be processed.

de_text: Bei Feststellung eines Einbruches in ein Gebäude oder einen Raum ist der Bereich durch geeignete Maßnahmen (Absperren mit rot/weißem Band, Abringen eines Schildes etc.) zu sichern.
en_grtr: If you notice that a building or room has been broken into, the area must be secured by appropriate means (block it off using red and white tape, put up a sign, etc.).
tr_llm: When a break-in into a building or a room is detected, the area must be secured by appropriate measures (such as cordoning off with red/white tape, removing a sign, etc.).
tr_llm_glsr: When a break‑in into a building or a room is detected, the team must secure the area with appropriate measures (e.g., cordoning off with red‑white tape, removing a sign, etc.).

de_text: Es soll erreicht werden, dass der Bereich nicht betreten werden kann.
en_grtr: Make sure that nobody can enter the area.
tr_llm: It should be ensured that the area cannot be entered.
tr_llm_glsr: Make sure that nobody can enter the area.

de_text: Dies dient unter anderem der Sicherstellung von Spuren, die der Polizei bei der Aufklärung helfen können.
en_grtr: Among other things, this will help to preserve any clues that might aid the police in their investigation.
tr_llm: This serves, among other things, to secure evidence that can help the police in the investigation.
tr_llm_glsr: Among other things, this is intended to preserve evidence that can assist the Police in their investigation.

de_text: Räume in die eingebrochen wurde nicht betreten!

tr_llm_glsr: Do not enter any rooms that have been broken into!

tr_llm_glsr: Call the police on the emergency number 110.

tr_llm_glsr: Notify the relevant cluster head in Section 4.1.

de_text: Die Abteilung 4.3 über zu beseitigende Mängel, je nach Dringlichkeit, telefonisch oder schriftlich per Dienstleistungsauftrag informieren.
en_grtr: Notify Section 4.3 of anything that needs fixing, either by phone or in a written service request if it is less urgent.

tr_llm_glsr: Inform Section 4.3 regarding defects to be remedied, depending on urgency, by phone or in writing via a service order.

tr_llm_glsr: Repair any damaged doors, windows, etc. as best you can.

de_text: Firmen von beschädigten Automaten sollten in Kenntnis gesetzt werden, sofern dies möglich ist.

tr_llm_glsr: Companies with damaged vending machines should be notified, as long as this is Potential.

de_text: In den betreffenden Institutionen ist schriftlich der Schaden festzuhalten und sofern dies möglich ist, sind die Gegenstände aufzulisten.

tr_llm_glsr: In the relevant institutions, the damage must be recorded in writing, and if this is Potential, the items should be listed.

de_text: Einen kurzen Bericht mit den Feststellungen zum Ereignis und den genauen Angaben zu den gestohlenen Gegenständen an den Sachgebiet Sicherheit 4.1 senden, damit die Strafverfolgung bearbeitet werden kann.

tr_llm_glsr: Send a short report with the findings on the incident and the exact details of the stolen items to the Security Unit 4.1, so that the prosecution can be processed.

de_text: Gemäß geltenden Rechtsvorschriften (Arbeitsschutzgesetz) und Vorschriften der Unfallkasse (Unfallverhütungsvorschrift „Grundsätze der Prävention“) müssen Arbeiten verschiedener Arbeitgeber*innen zur Vermeidung möglicher Gefährdungen aufeinander abgestimmt sein.

tr_llm_glsr: According to the applicable legal regulations (Occupational Safety Act) and the regulations of the accident insurance fund (accident prevention regulation “Basic principles of prevention”), work carried out by different employers must be coordinated to prevent possible hazards.

de_text: Bei Störungen oder Ausfällen ist ein Dienstleistungsantrag mit einer genauen Problem-Beschreibung über das Meldeportal zu erstellen.

en_grtr: We monitor buildings that consume a lot of energy and plan ways to reduce this consumption and make them as energy-efficient as possible.

tr_llm_glsr: We monitor buildings with high energy consumption and plan measures that reduce energy use and maximize energy efficiency.

tr_llm_glsr: Please create a service request on the reporting portal.

de_text: ist ein Dienstleistungsantrag über das Meldeportal mit Angabe der Equipmentnummer des Feuerlöschers zu erstellen.

de_text: Dazu gehören: alle Anlagen, die der Zufuhr von Heizwärme dienen.
en_grtr: This includes: all equipment designed to supply heat.
tr_llm: This includes: all installations that serve the supply of heating.
tr_llm_glsr: This includes all installations that serve the supply of heating.

tr_llm: Drinking water, laboratory water, wastewater and natural gas main facilities; toilet facilities and showers.
tr_llm_glsr: Primary drinking water, laboratory water, wastewater and natural gas systems; toilet facilities and showers.

de_text: Bei einer mechanischen Lüftung wird frische Außenluft mittels Ventilatoren angesaugt und mithilfe Belüftungskanälen und Ventilatoren im Gebäude verteilt.
en_grtr: With mechanical ventilation, fresh air is sucked in from outside with the help of fans and distributed within the building using more fans and ventilation ducts.
tr_llm: In a mechanical ventilation system, fresh outdoor air is drawn in by fans and distributed throughout the building using ventilation ducts and fans.
tr_llm_glsr: In a mechanical ventilation system, fresh outdoor air is drawn in by fans and distributed throughout the building using ventilation ducts and fans.

de_text: Erzeugen mittels eines Kompressors kalte Luft oder kaltes Wasser, das zur Kühlung von Prozessen/Geräten/Raumluft etc. benötigt wird.
en_grtr: These use a compressor to generate cold air or cold water needed to cool processes, equipment, the indoor air, etc.

tr_llm_glsr: Produce cold air or cold water using a compressor, which is required for cooling processes, equipment, room air, etc.

de_text: Dienen der Erzeugung und Aufrechterhaltung einer angenehmen oder benötigten Raumluft-Qualität (bezüglich Temperatur, Feuchtigkeit).
en_grtr: They are used to generate and maintain a pleasant or required quality of indoor air (in terms of temperature and humidity).
tr_llm: Serve the generation and maintenance of a pleasant or required indoor air quality (with respect to temperature, humidity).
tr_llm_glsr: Serve to generate and maintain a pleasant or required indoor air quality (with respect to temperature and humidity).

de_text: Sie schaffen in Gebäuden/Räumen etc. die notwendigen Umgebungsbedingungen für technische Anlagen/Prozesse/Experimente/biologisches Material etc. oder ein für den Menschen angenehmes Raumklima.
en_grtr: Within buildings, rooms, etc., they create the ambient conditions required for technical systems, processes, experiments, organic material, etc. or a pleasant room climate for the people working in them.
tr_llm: They provide the necessary environmental conditions in buildings/rooms, etc., for technical systems, processes, experiments, biological material, etc., or a room climate that is comfortable for people.
tr_llm_glsr: They establish the required environmental conditions in buildings, rooms, etc., for technical attachments, processes, experiments, biological material, and so on, or a room climate that is pleasant for humans.

de_text: Melden Sie sich gerne bei uns und wir helfen Ihnen weiter!
en_grtr: please do not hesitate to get in touch with us, and we will help you out.
tr_llm: Feel free to get in touch with us and we will help you further!
tr_llm_glsr: Feel free to contact us and we'll help you further!

de_text: Bei Störungen oder Ausfällen der unten genannten Anlagen ist ein Dienstleistungsantrag mit einer genauen Problem-Beschreibung über das Meldeportal zu erstellen.
en_grtr: If any of the systems listed below develop a fault or stop working altogether, please create a service request in the reporting portal containing a precise description of the problem.

tr_llm_glsr: In the event of disturbances or failures of the attachments listed below, a service request with a detailed problem description must be submitted via the reporting portal.

de_text: Um den Workflow rund um die noch vorhandenen digitalen PDF-Anträge zu erleichtern, kann der unten aufgeführte Prozess via E-Mail verwendet werden.
en_grtr: The email-based process explained below can be used to simplify the workflow for requests that are still to be submitted electronically as PDFs.
tr_llm: To streamline the workflow around the remaining digital PDF applications, the process listed below can be used via email.
tr_llm_glsr: To simplify the workflow surrounding the remaining digital PDF applications, the process listed below can be used via Email.

de_text: Wir arbeiten weiterhin hart daran, PDF-Formulare durch komplett digitalisierte Formulare zu ersetzen, welche an bereits bestehende Datenbanken angebunden werden können.
en_grtr: We are still working hard to replace PDF forms with fully digitized equivalents that can be linked to existing databases.
tr_llm: We continue to work hard to replace PDF forms with fully digitized forms that can be linked to existing databases.
tr_llm_glsr: We continue to work hard to replace PDF forms with fully digitized forms that can be linked to existing databases.

de_text: Bis dahin bitten wir Sie um etwas Geduld, die sich lohnen wird, wenn die entsprechenden Daten dann nicht nur digital eingeben werden können, sondern auch gleichzeitig bereits in Datenbanken hinterlegt werden können.
en_grtr: Until then, we would ask for your patience. Rest assured that the wait will definitely be worth it when the corresponding data can not only be entered online but also stored in databases there and then.
tr_llm: Until then, we ask you to be a little patient, which will be worthwhile when the relevant data can not only be entered digitally, but can also already be stored in databases simultaneously.
tr_llm_glsr: Until then, we ask for a bit of patience, which will be worth it when the relevant data can not only be entered digitally, but also at the same time already be stored in databases.

de_text: Es reicht, wenn jeder Zeichnungsberechtigte eine entsprechende E-Mail von seinem eigenen Account sendet und alle weiteren Empfänger*innen weiterhin in Cc führt.
en_grtr: All that now needs to happen is for every authorized signatory to send a corresponding email from their account and keep all other recipients in cc.
tr_llm: It is sufficient if each authorized signatory sends a corresponding email from their own account and continues to keep all other recipients in CC.
tr_llm_glsr: It is sufficient that each authorized signatory sends the appropriate Email from his own account and keeps all other recipients in Cc.

de_text: Dieser Prozess gilt nur für und zwischen Mitarbeiter*innen der Universität Bonn.
en_grtr: this process is only valid for and among University of Bonn staff.
tr_llm: This process applies only to and between employees of the University of Bonn.
tr_llm_glsr: This process applies only to and between employees at the University of Bonn.

de_text: Formulare und Anträge benötigen keine Unterschrift mehr, sondern müssen lediglich per E-Mail durch die Zeichnungsberechtigten genehmigt werden.
en_grtr: Forms and requests no longer need to be signed and merely require email approval from the authorized signatories.
tr_llm: Forms and applications no longer require a signature, but must simply be approved by the authorized signatories via email.
tr_llm_glsr: Forms and applications no longer require a Signature; they only need to be approved by the authorized signatories via Email.

de_text: Das Portal löst das alte Intranet ab und führt alle Informationen und Services rund um die Universitätsverwaltung themenorientiert zusammen.
en_grtr: Replacing the old intranet, the portal brings together all the information and services relating to central administration and arranges them neatly by topic.
tr_llm: The portal replaces the old intranet and brings together all information and services related to university administration in a topic‑oriented manner.
tr_llm_glsr: The portal replaces the old intranet and consolidates all information and services related to university administration in a topic‑oriented manner.

de_text: So können auch Nutzende ohne Struktur- und Organisationskenntnisse schnell und einfach die benötigten Informationen auffinden können.
en_grtr: This means that even users without an in-depth knowledge of the University’s setup can find what they need quickly and easily.
tr_llm: Thus, even users without knowledge of structure and organization can quickly and easily find the required information.
tr_llm_glsr: Thus, even users without structural and organizational knowledge can quickly and easily find the information they need.

de_text: Aktuell liegt beispielsweise ein Fokus auf dem Ausbau der englischsprachigen Version des Portals.
en_grtr: One of the current areas of focus, for example, is expanding its English-language version.

tr_llm_glsr: Currently, for example, the focus is on expanding the English-language version of the portal.

de_text: „Das Serviceportal ist ein Meilenstein für unsere Universität.
en_grtr: “The Service Portal is a landmark achievement for our University.
tr_llm: The service portal is a milestone for our university.
tr_llm_glsr: The Service Portal is a landmark achievement for our University.

de_text: „Ich bin stolz auf das Projektteam, das mit großem Einsatz einen sehr wertvollen Beitrag zum Erfolg unserer Uni geleistet hat.

tr_llm_glsr: I am proud of the project team, which, with great dedication, has made a very valuable contribution to the success of our university.

de_text: Sicher haben Sie schon mal gespinkst oder mussten Informationen finden und haben dafür das neue Serviceportal genutzt?!
en_grtr: We bet you’ve already had a quick peek or used the new Service Portal to find that piece of information you needed, haven’t you?

tr_llm_glsr: Surely you've already taken a leak or needed to find information and used the new Service Portal for that?

de_text: Wir hoffen, Sie haben schnell gefunden, was Sie brauchen und fühlen sich gut informiert!

de_text: Bei Schwierigkeiten, Fragen oder Anmerkungen, schreiben Sie gerne an serviceportal@verwaltung.uni-bonn.de oder wenden sich an Lena Zimmer, T: 73-5725 oder Daniel Epple, T: - 5787.

de_text: Die Abteilung für Wissenschaftskommunikation freut sich über Ihre Anfrage!
en_grtr: The Science Communication section is looking forward to hearing from you.
tr_llm: The Department of Science Communication is pleased to receive your inquiry!
tr_llm_glsr: The Science Communication section is looking forward to hearing from you!

de_text: Universitätsangehörige sind immer wieder aufgefordert, mit verschiedenen Zielgruppen, Multiplikator*innen und Stakeholdern zielgerichtet zu kommunizieren.
en_grtr: Members of the University often find themselves having to communicate with various target groups, multipliers and stakeholders.
tr_llm: University members are repeatedly asked to communicate purposefully with various target groups, multipliers, and stakeholders.
tr_llm_glsr: University members are repeatedly urged to communicate purposefully with various target groups, multipliers and stakeholders.

de_text: Die Kommunikationsberatung zeigt, wie Sie ihr Interesse zielgerichtet und effektiv vertreten können.
en_grtr: Communications advice can show you how you can represent your interests in a targeted and effective way.
tr_llm: The communications consultancy shows how you can represent your interest in a focused and effective way.
tr_llm_glsr: The communications-advice shows how you can represent your interest in a focused and effective manner.

de_text: Beispielsweise dann, wenn sich Uni-Angehörige fragen, ob sie mit dem aktuellen Förderantrag Mittel für Wissenschaftskommunikation / PR beantragen sollen.
en_grtr: For example, when members of the University ask whether they are expected to apply for funding for academic communication or PR activities with their current funding application.
tr_llm: For example, when university staff wonder whether they should request funds for science communication/PR in the current grant application.
tr_llm_glsr: For example, when university staff wonder whether they should request funds for science communication/PR in the current funding application.

de_text: Wenn ein künftiges teilnehmerfinanziertes Master-Programm vor der Akkreditierung steht und sich bereits Fragen zur Kommunikationsarbeit stellen, sowohl inhaltlich als auch personell und finanziell.
en_grtr: When an upcoming participant-funded master’s program is about to undergo accreditation and questions about communications work—concerning content as well as personnel and finances—have already begun to emerge.
tr_llm: If a future participant‑financed master’s program is pending accreditation and questions about communication work already arise, both regarding content and regarding personnel and finances.
tr_llm_glsr: If a forthcoming participant‑funded master’s program is awaiting accreditation and questions about its communication work are already arising—both regarding content and staffing and financing.

de_text: Oder wenn ein Projektabschluss bestimmten Zielgruppen gegenüber wirksam positioniert soll - dann kann eine Kommunikationsberatung helfen.
en_grtr: Or when the completion of a project needs to be showcased effectively to certain target groups—these are all situations in which communications advice can help.
tr_llm: Or if a project completion is to be effectively positioned toward certain target groups, then a communications consultancy can help.
tr_llm_glsr: Or, if a project’s completion needs to be positioned effectively for certain target groups, then communications‑advice can help.

de_text: Es entsteht ein Zeitplan sowie ein Überblick zu den voraussichtlichen Kosten.
en_grtr: producing a timetable and an overview of likely costs.
tr_llm: A schedule and an overview of the anticipated costs are being created.
tr_llm_glsr: Producing a timetable and an overview of likely costs.

de_text: Der Nutzen für die Uni-Kolleg*innen kann darin bestehen, sich einen Umweg gespart zu haben, eine gute Idee oder einen hilfreichen Kontakt mitzunehmen, am (vorläufigen) Beratungsende ein Kommunikationskonzept zu haben sowie zielgerichtet eine Kampagne zu starten.
en_grtr: University colleagues can benefit in various ways: saving themselves time and effort, acquiring a good idea or useful contact, having a communications concept in place at the (provisional) end of the consultation, or launching a campaign in a targeted way.
tr_llm: The benefit for the university colleagues can be that they have saved themselves a detour, taken a good idea or a helpful contact, have a communication concept at the (preliminary) end of the consultation, and can launch a campaign in a targeted way.
tr_llm_glsr: The benefit for university colleagues may be that they avoid an unnecessary detour, gain a good idea or a useful Contact, have a communication concept ready at the (preliminary) end of the consultation, and be able to launch a targeted campaign.

de_text: Für die spezifischen Anforderungen eines Kanals (z.B. Instagram, Newsletter, forsch) oder eines bestimmten Medienproduktes (Pressemitteilung, Podcast, Post) sind wie bisher die jeweils zuständigen und erfahrenen Kolleg*innen der Fachabteilungen die richtigen Ansprechpartner.
en_grtr: the relevant, highly experienced colleagues in the specialist departments are still your go-to contacts for the specific requirements of a channel (e.g. Instagram, the newsletter or “forsch”) or a particular media product (press release, podcast, post).
tr_llm: For the specific requirements of a channel (e.g., Instagram, newsletter, research) or a particular media product (press release, podcast, post), the responsible and experienced colleagues in the respective specialist departments are still the right points of contact.
tr_llm_glsr: For the specific requirements of a channel (e.g., Instagram, newsletter, forsch) or a particular media product (press release, podcast, post), the appropriate contacts remain the responsible and experienced colleagues in the respective specialist departments.

de_text: Sie helfen - teils mit Unterstützung externer Dienstleister – auch bei der Herstellung eines konkreten Medienproduktes.
en_grtr: They will also help you to create a tangible media product, bringing in external service providers where necessary.
tr_llm: You help – partly with the support of external service providers – also in the production of a specific media product.
tr_llm_glsr: They also help, partly with the support of external service providers, in producing a specific media product.

de_text: Ob klassisch per Pressemitteilung oder per Podcast und Video - das Team der Hochschulkommunikation steht Ihnen bei allen Anliegen rund um das Thema Kommunikation nach innen und nach außen zur Verfügung!
en_grtr: whether we go down the traditional route of the press release or make a podcast or video. Either way, the University Communications team will be happy to help you with anything to do with internal or external communication.
tr_llm: Whether through a traditional press release or a podcast and video, the university communications team is available to assist you with any matters related to internal and external communication.
tr_llm_glsr: Whether it's a traditional press release or a podcast and video, the University Communications team is available to assist you with any subject of inquiry concerning the topic of internal and external communication.

de_text: Wir möchten Ihnen die Arbeit erleichtern!
en_grtr: We want to make life easier for you.
tr_llm: We want to make your work easier!
tr_llm_glsr: We want to make life easier for you.

de_text: Thema über das Formular unten einreichen.
en_grtr: Submit your topic using the form below.
tr_llm: Submit the topic using the form below.
tr_llm_glsr: Submit your topic using the form below.

de_text: Das Team der Hochschulkommunikation bespricht das Thema spätestens in der nächsten Morgenrunde. Die Morgenrunden finden täglich statt.
en_grtr: The University Communications team will discuss the topic at their next daily morning meeting, if not before.
tr_llm: The university communications team will discuss the topic at the latest in the next morning meeting. The morning meetings take place daily.
tr_llm_glsr: The University Communications team will discuss the Topic no later than the next morning meeting. The morning meetings take place every day.

de_text: Sie erhalten eine Rückmeldung mit der für Sie zuständigen Ansprechperson des Dezernats.
en_grtr: You will be given feedback and told who in the division is handling your request.
tr_llm: You will receive a response with the department’s contact person who is responsible for you.
tr_llm_glsr: You will receive a reply that includes the department’s Contact responsible for you.

de_text: Die Uni Bonn hat eine zentrale Website, www.uni-bonn.de, sowie mehrere hunderte dezentrale Webseiten der Fakultäten, Institute usw.
en_grtr: The University of Bonn has a central website, www.uni-bonn.de, and several hundred local websites and web pages run by its faculties, departments, institutes, etc.
tr_llm: The University of Bonn has a central website, www.uni-bonn.de, as well as several hundred decentralized websites of the faculties, institutes, etc.
tr_llm_glsr: The University of Bonn has a central website, www.uni-bonn.de, as well as several hundred decentralized web-pages for its faculties, institutes, and so on.

de_text: Um eine Webseite zu erstellen, bietet die Uni das Content Management System (CMS) Plone 5 an.
en_grtr: The University provides the Plone 5 content management system (CMS) for creating websites.
tr_llm: To create a website, the university offers the Content Management System (CMS) Plone 5.
tr_llm_glsr: To create a web-page, the university offers the Content Management System (CMS) Plone 5.

de_text: Feedback, Änderungen und Anmerkung zu Inhalten auf der zentralen Webseite der Universität Bonn (www.uni-bonn.de) können Sie gerne melden.
en_grtr: You are welcome to provide feedback, request amendments and comment on content on the University of Bonn’s central website (www.uni-bonn.de).
tr_llm: Feel free to report feedback, changes, and comments on content on the central website of the University of Bonn (www.uni-bonn.de).
tr_llm_glsr: You are welcome to report feedback, changes, and observations regarding content on the central web-page at the University of Bonn (www.uni-bonn.de).

de_text: Das Redaktionsteam kümmert sich um Ihr Anliegen und tritt mit Ihnen dazu in Kontakt.
en_grtr: The editorial team will look into your request and get back to you.
tr_llm: The editorial team will take care of your request and will get in touch with you about it.
tr_llm_glsr: The editorial team handles your request and makes contact with you about it.

de_text: Bitte umreissen Sie hier ihr Anliegen.
en_grtr: Please provide a brief description of your request.
tr_llm: Please outline your request here.
tr_llm_glsr: Please provide a brief description of your request.

de_text: Ihr Eintrag wird der Titel des Vorgangs.
en_grtr: The text you enter will be used as the title for your case.
tr_llm: Your entry will be the title of the process.
tr_llm_glsr: Your entry will become the Title of the process.

de_text: Sollten Sie Inhalte auf dezentralen Webseiten der Universität Bonn ändern wollen (z.B. www.ulb.uni-bonn.de oder www.psychologie.uni-bonn.de) kontaktieren Sie bitte den oder die genannte Ansprechpartner*in im Impressum der jeweiligen Webseite.
en_grtr: If you would like to make changes to any content on a local University of Bonn website (e.g. www.ulb.uni-bonn.de or www.psychologie.uni-bonn.de), please get in touch with the person listed as a contact in the “Site notice” section of the relevant website.
tr_llm: If you wish to change content on decentralized websites of the University of Bonn (e.g., www.ulb.uni-bonn.de or www.psychologie.uni-bonn.de), please contact the person listed as the contact in the imprint of the respective website.
tr_llm_glsr: If you want to modify existing Content on decentralized web-pages at the University of Bonn (e.g., www.usl.uni-bonn.de or www.psychology.uni-bonn.de), please get in touch with the Contact listed in the imprint of the respective web-page.

de_text: Das Plone 5 Team bietet regelmäßige Schulungen und Sprechstunden an, die Sie ohne Anmeldung in Anspruch nehmen können.
en_grtr: The Plone 5 team holds regular training sessions and office hours, which you can make use of without having to register.

tr_llm_glsr: The Plone 5 team offers regular training sessions and office hours that you can attend without registration.

de_text: Gerne auch wenn Sie die ersten Seiten erstellt haben oder vor/nach dem Livegang stehen.
en_grtr: even if you have the first few pages ready, are just about to go live or have already launched.
tr_llm: Sure, even if you have created the first pages or are before/after the go-live.
tr_llm_glsr: We’re happy to help even if you’ve already created the first pages or are before/after the go‑live.
